34916.title: Climate Disasters and Intergenerational Equity: A Fiscal Rule for Sustainable Development
34916.zh_title: 气候灾难与代际公平：可持续发展的财政规则
34916.authors: Harrison Hong, Heqing Huang, Neng Wang
34916.abstract: Climate disasters threaten intergenerational equity by exposing future generations to rising risks. We develop a model in which a government learns about disaster risk and enforces a sustainability criterion requiring expected social welfare to be non-decreasing over time. This criterion—similar to the principle underlying the UN Sustainable Development Goals—can be decentralized through state-contingent fiscal instruments: when perceived disaster risk is high, the constraint binds and government raises a consumption tax to finance investment subsidies for resilience. Such a fiscal rule leads to intergenerational-welfare smoothing and improves asset valuations despite adverse climate news due to commitments to future resilience. Compared with a government that adopts a social discount rate lower than households’, the sustainability-constraint rule responds to disaster risk and is better aligned with observed consumption-based climate-resilience taxes, such as those implemented in Greece and Spain.
34916.zh_abstract: 气候灾难通过使后代面临不断上升的风险，威胁到代际公平。我们构建了一个模型，在该模型中，政府学习了解灾难风险，并执行一项可持续性标准，要求预期社会福利随时间推移非递减。这一标准——类似于联合国可持续发展目标背后的原则——可以通过依赖于国家状况的财政工具来实现分散化：当感知到的灾难风险较高时，约束条件生效，政府提高消费税，为增强韧性的投资补贴提供资金。这种财政规则会导致代际福利平滑化，并且尽管存在不利的气候消息，但由于对未来韧性的承诺，它改善了资产估值。与采用低于家庭的社会贴现率的政府相比，可持续性约束规则能够对灾难风险做出反应，并且与观察到的基于消费的气候韧性税收（例如希腊和西班牙实施的税收）更为一致。
34916.meta: Programs：AP, DEV, EEE, PE, POL；JEL：E20, G01, H56

34915.title: The Economics of Tariffs
34915.abstract: A central insight from neoclassical economics is that international trade operates like an improvement in production technology. It generates mutual aggregate welfare gains for countries as a whole, but creates winners and losers within countries. Tariffs are a tax on this trading technology and distort the prices faced by domestic consumers and producers. Large countries can use tariffs to improve their terms of trade on world markets. But if all countries try to do so, they can end up with lower welfare than if they cooperated to liberalize trade. Tariffs can be used to redistribute income between the winners and losers from trade within countries. But there can be other more efficient ways to achieve redistribution. Policies to promote economic activity in critical industries can be rationalized based on externalities or national security. But these arguments typically rationalize targeted policies towards those industries and tariffs can be dominated by other policy interventions. Empirical findings from the recent waves of U.S. tariffs suggest that most of the incidence of these tariffs has been borne by U.S. importers, wholesalers, retailers and consumers rather than by foreign exporters. These tariffs have led to a large-scale reorganization of U.S. supply chains away from China to third countries. Although this reorganization has substantially reduced China's share of U.S. imports, the U.S. remains indirectly exposed to China through the imports of these third countries.
34915.zh_abstract: 新古典经济学的一个核心见解是，国际贸易的运作类似于生产技术的改进。它为国家整体带来相互的总体福利收益，但在国家内部创造赢家和输家。关税是对这种贸易技术征收的一种税，并扭曲了国内消费者和生产者面临的价格。大国可以利用关税来改善其在世界市场上的贸易条件。但如果所有国家都试图这样做，它们最终可能获得比合作实现贸易自由化时更低的福利。关税可用于在国家内部贸易的赢家和输家之间重新分配收入。但可能存在其他更有效的实现再分配的方式。基于外部性或国家安全，可以合理化促进关键行业经济活动的政策。但这些论点通常合理化针对这些行业的目标政策，而关税可能被其他政策干预所主导。来自近期美国关税浪潮的实证发现表明，这些关税的大部分负担由美国进口商、批发商、零售商和消费者承担，而非外国出口商。这些关税导致了美国供应链从中国向第三国的大规模重组。尽管这种重组大幅降低了中国在美国进口中的份额，但美国通过从这些第三国的进口，仍然间接暴露于中国。

34914.title: Loneliness, Mental Health and the Work-From-Home Revolution
34914.zh_title: 孤独感、心理健康与居家办公革命
34914.authors: Benjamin W. Cowan, Joe M. Spearing
34914.abstract: The large increase in remote work since 2020 has prompted concerns about adverse effects on population loneliness and mental health. We show that any such adverse effects were transitory, in a UK context. We use panel data from UKHLS and differences-in-differences estimators that flexibly control for a rich set of covariates to compare changes in key variables amongst two groups: those who worked in teleworkable occupations in 2019, and those who worked in non-teleworkable occupations in 2019. While the former experience large and persistent increases in their probability of working remotely compared to the latter, adverse relative changes in self-reported loneliness or adverse mental health symptoms during the pandemic had disappeared by the year 2023.
34914.zh_abstract: 自2020年以来远程工作的大幅增加引发了对其对人口孤独感和心理健康产生不利影响的担忧。我们表明，在英国背景下，任何此类不利影响都是暂时的。我们使用来自UKHLS的面板数据以及灵活控制丰富协变量集的双重差分估计量，比较两组人群关键变量的变化：2019年从事可远程办公职业的人群，以及2019年从事不可远程办公职业的人群。尽管与后者相比，前者远程工作的概率经历了巨大且持续的增长，但在疫情期间，自我报告的孤独感或不良心理健康症状方面的相对不利变化到2023年已经消失。

34913.title: Understanding High Schools’ Effects on Longer-Term Outcomes
34913.zh_title: 理解高中对长期结果的影响
34913.authors: Preeya P. Mbekeani, John P. Papay, Ann Mantil, Richard J. Murnane
34913.abstract: Improving education and labor market outcomes for low-income students is critical for advancing socioeconomic mobility in the United States. We use longitudinal data on five cohorts of 9th grade students to explore how Massachusetts public high schools affect the longer-term outcomes of students, with a special focus on students from low-income families. Using detailed administrative and student survey data, we estimate school value-added impacts on college outcomes and earnings. Observationally similar students who attend a school at the 80th percentile of the value-added distribution instead of a school at the 20th percentile are 11% more likely to enroll in college, are 31% more likely to graduate from a four-year college, and earn 25% (or $\$10,500$) more annually at age 30. On average, schools that improve students’ longer-run outcomes the most are those that improve their 10th grade test scores and increase their college plans the most.
34913.zh_abstract: 改善低收入学生的教育和劳动力市场结果对于促进美国的社会经济流动性至关重要。我们使用五届九年级学生的纵向数据，探讨马萨诸塞州公立高中如何影响学生的长期结果，特别关注来自低收入家庭的学生。利用详细的行政和学生调查数据，我们估计了学校在大学结果和收入方面的增值影响。就读于增值分布第80百分位学校而非第20百分位学校的、在可观测特征上相似的学生，其大学入学可能性高出11%，四年制大学毕业可能性高出31%，并且在30岁时的年收入高出25%（即10,500美元）。平均而言，最能改善学生长期结果的学校，也是最能提高他们十年级考试成绩和最大程度增加他们大学计划的学校。

34912.title: Online Buddies for Job Seekers: A Field Experiment
34912.zh_title: 求职者的在线伙伴：一项实地实验
34912.authors: Bart K. de Koning, Paul Muller, Michèle Belot, Yvonne Engels, Didier Fouarge, Mario Keer, Philipp Kircher, Sandra Phlippen
34912.abstract: We design an online platform to connect unemployed job seekers with ‘buddies’: former job seekers who recently found employment. We focus on job seekers who search in occupations with poor prospects and buddies who successfully switched occupations. In a randomized controlled trial, we evaluate the impact of access to the platform on labor market outcomes. We find sizable effects. Thirteen to 18 months after getting access, initially unemployed job seekers are 6 percentage points (11%) more likely to be employed and earn e 226 more per month than those without access. The positive impact is concentrated among the long-term unemployed.
34912.zh_abstract: 我们设计了一个在线平台，将失业求职者与“伙伴”——最近找到工作的前求职者——联系起来。我们重点关注在前景不佳的职业中求职的求职者，以及成功转换职业的伙伴。在一项随机对照试验中，我们评估了使用该平台对劳动力市场结果的影响。我们发现了显著的效果。在获得使用权限13到18个月后，最初失业的求职者比没有使用权限的求职者就业的可能性高出6个百分点（11%），并且每月多赚226欧元。这种积极影响主要集中在长期失业者身上。

34911.title: How Do Interest Rates Affect Consumption? Household Debt and the Role of Asset Prices
34911.zh_title: 利率如何影响消费？家庭债务与资产价格的作用
34911.authors: Angus K. Foulis, Jonathon Hazell, Atif R. Mian, Belinda Tracey
34911.abstract: This paper estimates how rate cuts increase consumption, via debt and asset prices. Using administrative UK data on mortgages and consumption, we exploit the expiry of fixed-rate mortgages to construct six million household-level natural experiments. A 1pp reduction in mortgage rates raises consumption by 3% in the following 6 months. Using plausibly exogenous variation in how house prices respond to rate cuts, we show that consumption increases mostly because households borrow against higher house prices; lower debt service after rate cuts matters less. These results suggest that in large part, monetary policy affects consumption through asset prices and borrowing
34911.zh_abstract: 本文估计了降息如何通过债务和资产价格增加消费。利用英国关于抵押贷款和消费的行政数据，我们利用固定利率抵押贷款的到期日，构建了六百万个家庭层面的自然实验。抵押贷款利率降低1个百分点，会在接下来的6个月内使消费增加3%。利用利率下调如何影响房价的外生性变化，我们表明消费增加主要是因为家庭以更高的房价为抵押进行借贷；降息后较低的债务偿还额影响较小。这些结果表明，货币政策在很大程度上通过资产价格和借贷来影响消费。
34911.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E0, E20, G5, G51

34910.title: AI, Human Cognition and Knowledge Collapse
34910.zh_title: 人工智能、人类认知与知识崩溃
34910.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Dingwen Kong, Asuman Ozdaglar
34910.abstract: We study how generative AI, and in particular agentic AI, shapes human learning incentives and the long-run evolution of society’s information ecosystem. We build a dynamic model of learning and decision-making in which successful decisions require combining shared, community-level general knowledge with individual-level, context-specific knowledge; these two inputs are complements. Learning exhibits economies of scope: costly human effort jointly produces a private signal about their own context and a “thin” public signal that accumulates into the community’s stock of general knowledge, generating a learning externality. Agentic AI delivers context-specific recommendations that substitute for human effort. By contrast, a richer stock of general knowledge complements human effort by raising its marginal return. The model highlights a sharp dynamic tension: while agentic AI can improve contemporaneous decision quality, it can also erode learning incentives that sustain long-run collective knowledge. When human effort is sufficiently elastic and agentic recommendations exceed an accuracy threshold, the economy can tip into a knowledge-collapse steady state in which general knowledge vanishes ultimately, despite high-quality personalized advice. Welfare is generally non-monotone in agentic accuracy, implying an interior, welfare-maximizing level of agentic precision and motivating information-design regulations. In contrast, greater aggregation capacity for general knowledge—meaning more effective sharing and pooling of human-generated general knowledge—unambiguously raises welfare and increases resilience to knowledge collapse.
34910.zh_abstract: 我们研究生成式人工智能，特别是代理型人工智能，如何塑造人类学习激励以及社会信息生态系统的长期演化。我们构建了一个学习和决策的动态模型，在该模型中，成功的决策需要将共享的、社区层面的一般知识与个体层面的、特定情境的知识相结合；这两个输入是互补的。学习表现出范围经济：耗费成本的人类努力共同产生关于自身情境的私人信号和积累到社区一般知识存量中的“稀薄”公共信号，从而产生学习外部性。代理型人工智能提供替代人类努力的特定情境建议。相比之下，更丰富的一般知识存量通过提高其边际回报来补充人类努力。该模型突出了一个尖锐的动态张力：虽然代理型人工智能可以改善同期决策质量，但它也可能侵蚀维持长期集体知识的学习激励。当人类努力具有足够弹性且代理型建议超过某个准确性阈值时，经济可能陷入知识崩溃的稳态，其中一般知识最终消失，尽管存在高质量的个人化建议。福利通常随代理型准确性呈非单调变化，这意味着存在一个内部的、福利最大化的代理型精确度水平，并为信息设计监管提供了动机。相比之下，一般知识的更大聚合能力——即更有效地分享和汇集人类生成的一般知识——明确地提高了福利并增强了对知识崩溃的韧性。

34909.title: Multidimensional Signaling and the Rise of Cultural Politics
34909.zh_title: 多维信号传递与文化政治的兴起
34909.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Georgy Egorov, Konstantin Sonin
34909.abstract: In turbulent times, political labels become increasingly uninformative about politicians’ true policy preferences or their ability to withstand the influence of special interest groups. We offer a model in which politicians use campaign rhetoric to signal their political preferences in multiple dimensions. In equilibrium, the less popular types try to pool with the more popular ones, whereas the more popular types seek to separate themselves. The ability of voters to process information shapes politicians’ campaign rhetoric. If the signals on the cultural dimension are more precise, politicians signal more there, even if the economy is more important to voters. The unpopular type benefits from increased conformity, which bridges the candidates’ rhetoric and makes it more difficult for voters to make an informed decision.
34909.zh_abstract: 在动荡时期，政治标签对于政治家真实的政策偏好或他们抵御特殊利益集团影响的能力变得越来越缺乏信息量。我们提供了一个模型，其中政治家使用竞选言论在多个维度上传递其政治偏好的信号。在均衡中，不太受欢迎的类型的政治家试图与更受欢迎的类型趋同，而更受欢迎的类型则寻求分离。选民处理信息的能力塑造了政治家的竞选言论。如果文化维度的信号更精确，政治家会在该维度上传递更多信号，即使经济对选民更重要。不受欢迎的类型从增加的趋同性中受益，这弥合了候选人之间的言论差异，并使选民更难做出明智的决定。

34908.title: Geoeconomic Competition and Capital Reallocation in Global FX Funding
34908.zh_title: 地缘经济竞争与全球外汇融资中的资本再配置
34908.abstract: We study geoeconomic competition and capital reallocation in global financial markets, using the foreign exchange (FX) funding market as our empirical setting. FX funding, obtained by borrowing one currency while pledging another through FX swaps, is instrumental to cross-border investment and provides high-frequency measures of capital reallocation. Countries compete for FX funding through policy actions that shift investment returns or funding costs, thereby inducing global portfolio rebalancing by private investors. We quantify this competition by measuring how one country’s inflow responds to another country’s actions, which we call “reallocation exposure.” Because observed funding flows reflect common shocks and strategic interactions across countries, bilateral influence is difficult to identify. We resolve this challenge by identifying “funding fronts,” the independent margins of portfolio adjustment that enable systematic estimation of reallocation exposure. Applying our framework to a proprietary dataset, we find that FX funding competition is concentrated in a small number of funding fronts, with a dominant U.S. dollar front accounting for most capital reallocation. Consequently, changes in U.S. conditions generate disproportionately large reallocations elsewhere. We use reallocation exposure to construct time-varying measures of geoeconomic power and show that variations systematically track major monetary, fiscal, and geopolitical events. Finally, we characterize the network of financial competition and cooperation and show that strategic responses implied by reallocation exposure align with cross-country movements in policy rates.
34908.zh_abstract: 我们以外汇（FX）融资市场为实证背景，研究全球金融市场中的地缘经济竞争与资本再配置。外汇融资通过外汇互换，以借入一种货币同时质押另一种货币的方式获得，对跨境投资至关重要，并提供了资本再配置的高频度量。各国通过改变投资回报或融资成本的政策行动来竞争外汇融资，从而引发私人投资者的全球投资组合再平衡。我们通过衡量一国资本流入如何响应另一国的行动（我们称之为“再配置暴露度”）来量化这种竞争。由于观测到的融资流量反映了共同冲击和跨国战略互动，双边影响难以识别。我们通过识别“融资前沿”（即投资组合调整的独立边际）来解决这一挑战，从而能够系统性地估计再配置暴露度。将我们的框架应用于专有数据集，我们发现外汇融资竞争集中在少数几个融资前沿，其中占主导地位的美元前沿占据了大部分资本再配置。因此，美国状况的变化会在其他地区引发不成比例的大规模再配置。我们利用再配置暴露度构建了地缘经济实力的时变度量，并表明其变化系统地追踪了重大货币、财政和地缘政治事件。最后，我们刻画了金融竞争与合作的网络，并表明由再配置暴露度隐含的战略反应与各国政策利率的跨国变动相一致。
34908.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM；JEL：F31, G12, G15, G28

34907.title: Efficiency, Insurance, and Redistribution Effects of Government Policies
34907.zh_title: 政府政策的效率、保险与再分配效应
34907.authors: Anmol Bhandari, David Evans, Mikhail Golosov, Thomas J. Sargent
34907.abstract: This paper decomposes welfare measures of policy reforms into parts attributable to redistribution and parts due to efficiency. We further decompose efficiency into subcomponents such as gains from better insurance against idiosyncratic and aggregate risk. Our decomposition of welfare measures associated with alternative feasible allocations is cast in terms of a coordinate system that uses generalized Pareto–Negishi weights to capture inequality and production and consumption wedges to capture distortions. Our decomposition has several desirable properties. It attributes welfare changes from movements along a Pareto frontier to redistribution; it attributes negative efficiency changes to movements away from the Pareto frontier; and it produces subcomponent shares of welfare changes that are numeraire-invariant and symmetric with respect to the direction of the reform. Our decomposition can be explained in terms of an implicit tax-and-transfer system in which redistribution captures real income changes, efficiency captures deadweight losses, and output costs.
34907.zh_abstract: 本文将政策改革的福利度量分解为可归因于再分配的部分和归因于效率的部分。我们进一步将效率分解为子组成部分，例如来自更好地对冲异质性和总体风险的保险收益。我们与替代可行配置相关的福利度量分解，是在一个使用广义帕累托-内石权重来刻画不平等、使用生产和消费楔子来刻画扭曲的坐标系中进行的。我们的分解具有几个理想的性质。它将沿帕累托边界移动带来的福利变化归因于再分配；它将远离帕累托边界移动带来的负向效率变化归因于效率损失；并且它产生的福利变化子组成部分份额具有计价物不变性和相对于改革方向的对称性。我们的分解可以用一个隐含的税收-转移支付系统来解释，其中再分配捕捉实际收入变化，效率捕捉无谓损失，以及产出成本。

34906.title: Equity Financing and Exports: Evidence from IPO Approvals in China
34906.zh_title: 股权融资与出口：来自中国IPO审批的证据
34906.authors: Robin Kaiji Gong, Yao Amber Li, Stephen Teng Sun, Shang-Jin Wei
34906.abstract: While finance theory distinguishes the roles of equity and debt in supporting firm growth, their differential impacts on international trade remain underexplored. This study provides the first empirical analysis of how access to equity financing affects firm exports. We leverage the unique institutional setting in China, where initial public offerings (IPOs) require stringent regulatory approval, ensuring that only qualified firms advance to the final review stage. Our empirical strategy compares the export performance of successful IPO applicants with that of “near misses"—applicants rejected at the final review meetings. To sharpen identification, we utilize meeting records to exclude rejections citing concerns about future revenue growth or profitability risks, as these may entail unobserved shocks to export performance. Our cohort based difference-in-differences analysis reveals that IPO approval leads to a significant annualized increase of more than 6% in firm exports over the subsequent six years. Distinct from previous findings on debt financing, IPO approval primarily affects the extensive margin, enabling firms to expand into more destination-product markets. Mechanism tests suggest that IPOs enhance exports by financing intangible investments and fostering risk-taking activities.
34906.zh_abstract: 尽管金融理论区分了股权和债务在支持企业增长中的作用，但它们对国际贸易的差异化影响仍未得到充分探索。本研究首次实证分析了获得股权融资如何影响企业出口。我们利用中国独特的制度环境，其中首次公开募股（IPO）需要严格的监管审批，确保只有合格的企业才能进入最终审核阶段。我们的实证策略比较了成功IPO申请者与“接近失败者”（即在最终审核会议上被拒绝的申请者）的出口表现。为了加强识别，我们利用会议记录排除了因对未来收入增长或盈利能力的风险表示担忧而被拒绝的申请，因为这些可能涉及对出口表现的未观测冲击。我们的基于队列的双重差分分析显示，IPO审批导致企业在随后六年内的出口年均增长超过6%。与先前关于债务融资的发现不同，IPO审批主要影响扩展边际，使企业能够扩展到更多的目的地-产品市场。机制检验表明，IPO通过为无形资产投资融资和促进风险承担活动来增强出口。

34905.title: When Benchmarks Fail: The Causes and Consequences of Negative Oil Prices
34905.zh_title: 当基准失效时：负油价的成因与后果
34905.authors: Erik P. Gilje, Robert C. Ready, Nikolai Roussanov, Jérôme P. Taillard
34905.abstract: On April 20, 2020, the crude oil benchmark in North America, the West Texas Intermediate (WTI) futures contract for delivery in Cushing, Oklahoma, settled below zero for the first time in history. We combine new empirical evidence with a stylized theoretical model to show that a key catalyst was the accumulation of unusually large long positions in the expiring contract held by uninformed financial traders unable to take physical delivery. These positions distorted the demand signal in the futures market, intensifying pressure on the limited storage capacity and precipitating a sharp price dislocation. We then document that this dislocation significantly influenced oil production decisions through contractual exposure to WTI-based pricing. Even oil producers far from Cushing that were not directly impacted by the storage constraints responded with sharp output curtailments in the face of heightened benchmark risk. Our findings highlight how transitory futures price dislocations due to noise trader demand can have real economic consequences.
34905.zh_abstract: 2020年4月20日，北美原油基准——俄克拉荷马州库欣交割的西德克萨斯中质原油（WTI）期货合约——结算价首次跌破零。我们结合新的实证证据和一个简约的理论模型表明，一个关键催化剂是无法进行实物交割的不知情金融交易者在即将到期的合约中积累了异常庞大的多头头寸。这些头寸扭曲了期货市场中的需求信号，加剧了有限存储容量的压力，并引发了剧烈的价格错位。随后，我们记录到，这种错位通过基于WTI定价的合约敞口显著影响了石油生产决策。即使是远离库欣、未直接受到存储约束影响的石油生产商，面对加剧的基准风险，也以大幅减产作为回应。我们的发现凸显了由噪音交易者需求导致的暂时性期货价格错位如何能够产生真实的经济后果。
34905.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE；JEL：G13, G14, G31, G40

34904.title: An Empirical Evaluation of Some Long-Horizon Macroeconomic Forecasts
34904.zh_title: 对某些长期宏观经济预测的实证评估
34904.authors: Kurt G. Lunsford, Kenneth D. West
34904.abstract: We use long-run annual cross-country data for 10 macroeconomic variables to evaluate the long-horizon forecast distributions of six forecasting models. The variables we use range from ones having little serial correlation to ones having persistence consistent with unit roots. Our forecasting models include simple time series models and frequency domain models developed in Müller and Watson (2016). For plausibly stationary variables, an AR(1) model and a frequency domain model that does not require the user to take a stand on the order of integration appear reasonably well calibrated for forecast horizons of 10 and 25 years. For plausibly non-stationary variables, a random walk model appears reasonably well calibrated for forecast horizons of 10 and 25 years.
34904.zh_abstract: 我们使用10个宏观经济变量的长期年度跨国数据来评估六个预测模型的长期预测分布。我们使用的变量范围从序列相关性很小的变量到具有与单位根一致的持久性的变量。我们的预测模型包括简单的时间序列模型以及Müller和Watson（2016）开发的频域模型。对于看似平稳的变量，一个AR(1)模型和一个不需要用户对积分阶数做出判断的频域模型，在10年和25年的预测期上似乎校准得相当好。对于看似非平稳的变量，一个随机游走模型在10年和25年的预测期上似乎校准得相当好。
34904.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME, TWP；JEL：C22, C53, E17

34903.title: Bubbles, Booms and Crashes in the US Stock Market 1792-2024
34903.zh_title: 美国股市中的泡沫、繁荣与崩盘：1792-2024
34903.authors: William N. Goetzmann, Otto Manninen, James Tyler
34903.abstract: We examine the historical frequency of stock market booms, crashes, and bubbles in the United States from 1792 to 2024 using aggregate market data and industry-level portfolios. We define a bubble as a large boom followed by a crash that reverses the market’s prior gains. Bubbles are extremely rare. We extend the industry-level analysis of Greenwood, Shleifer, and You (2019) through 2024 and replicate their findings out of sample using Cowles Commission industry data from 1871 to 1938. Booms do not reliably predict crashes, but they do predict higher subsequent volatility, increasing the likelihood of both large gains and large losses.
34903.zh_abstract: 我们使用总体市场数据和行业层面投资组合，考察了1792年至2024年美国股市繁荣、崩盘和泡沫的历史频率。我们将泡沫定义为一次大规模的繁荣，随后出现一次崩盘，逆转了市场先前的涨幅。泡沫极为罕见。我们将Greenwood、Shleifer和You（2019）的行业层面分析扩展至2024年，并使用1871年至1938年的考尔斯委员会行业数据在样本外复制了他们的发现。繁荣并不能可靠地预测崩盘，但它们确实预测了随后更高的波动性，从而增加了出现大幅收益和大幅亏损的可能性。

34902.title: Farmer Adoption and Payment Design Under Risk: Variability in Soil Carbon Sequestration Across Conservation Practices
34902.zh_title: 风险下的农户采纳与支付设计：不同保护性耕作措施下土壤碳封存的变异性
34902.abstract: Agricultural soils represent one of the largest underutilized opportunities for climate mitigation through land-based carbon sequestration. This study analyzes how farmers make long-term decisions about adopting soil conservation practices, such as no-till and reduced tillage, when soil organic carbon (SOC) accumulation generates additional payments, while explicitly considering risk associated with SOC sequestration variability. Using an infinite-horizon dynamic optimization model, the study quantifies the carbon payment levels required to incentivize adoption across different soil types. Results show that the required payments vary widely, from $\$8$/ton C/year on well-drained soils to $\$32$/ton C/year on poorly drained soils, highlighting the need for spatially targeted carbon incentives. The analysis demonstrates that risk in the SOC sequestration amount affects farmer choices: higher uncertainty increases the payments needed and can lead farmers to prefer lower-risk, lower-reward practices. For farmers who value intertemporal consumption smoothing, compensation requirements rise with the elasticity of intertemporal substitution. These findings underscore the importance of accounting for soil heterogeneity, outcome variability, and intertemporal preferences when designing effective carbon payment programs to promote long-term soil carbon sequestration.
34902.zh_abstract: 农业土壤是通过基于土地的碳封存实现气候减缓的最大未充分利用机会之一。本研究分析了当土壤有机碳（SOC）积累产生额外支付时，农户如何做出关于采纳保护性耕作措施（如免耕和减耕）的长期决策，同时明确考虑了与SOC封存变异性相关的风险。使用无限期界动态优化模型，该研究量化了在不同土壤类型上激励采纳所需的碳支付水平。结果显示，所需的支付差异很大，从排水良好土壤的每吨碳每年8美元到排水不良土壤的每吨碳每年32美元，凸显了对空间针对性碳激励的需求。分析表明，SOC封存量中的风险会影响农户的选择：更高的不确定性会增加所需的支付，并可能导致农户偏好风险较低、回报也较低的措施。对于重视跨期消费平滑的农户，补偿要求随着跨期替代弹性而上升。这些发现强调了在设计有效的碳支付计划以促进长期土壤碳封存时，考虑土壤异质性、结果变异性和跨期偏好的重要性。

34901.title: Did Foreigners Pay America's Tariffs? Quantity Discounts, Scale Economies and Incomplete Pass-Through
34901.zh_title: 外国人支付了美国的关税吗？数量折扣、规模经济与不完全传递
34901.abstract: Transaction-level quantity discounts are a pervasive feature of US trade, shaping both price variation and tariff incidence. Using administrative microdata, we show that these discounts reflect transaction-level scale economies rather than market power. Accounting for these micro-level economies resolves a key puzzle: while observed import prices rose one-for-one with 2018-2019 US tariffs, we show this was driven by the loss of scale economies as transaction sizes collapsed. Controlling for this scale effect, the strategic pass-through of tariffs to scale-free prices falls to 60 percent, implying foreign exporters absorbed a significant share of the burden through reduced markups.
34901.zh_abstract: 交易层面的数量折扣是美国贸易中普遍存在的特征，它塑造了价格变动和关税归宿。使用行政微观数据，我们表明这些折扣反映了交易层面的规模经济，而非市场势力。考虑这些微观层面的经济效应解决了一个关键谜题：虽然观测到的进口价格与2018-2019年美国关税同步上涨，但我们表明这是由交易规模骤降导致规模经济丧失所驱动的。在控制这一规模效应后，关税向无规模效应价格（scale-free prices）的战略性传递率降至60%，这意味着外国出口商通过降低加成率吸收了很大一部分负担。

34900.title: The Vietnam War and Racial Integration
34900.abstract: The Vietnam draft conscripted hundreds of thousands of young Americans into an integrated military. I combine near-random draft lottery variation with administrative voter data to study the long-run racial integration effects of coerced national service. Black and Native American veterans became more likely to marry white spouses, identify as Republicans, and live in more-integrated neighborhoods. Improved economic standing may partly mediate these effects. Effects are larger for Southerners and are precisely null for white veterans. Coerced military service generates substantial but asymmetric cross-racial political convergence and racial integration: Vietnam-era service caused about 20 percent of affected cohorts' interracial marriages.
34900.zh_abstract: 越南征兵制度将数十万美国年轻人征召入一支融合的军队。我结合近乎随机的征兵抽签变化与行政选民数据，来研究强制国民服役的长期种族融合效应。黑人和美洲原住民退伍军人更有可能与白人配偶结婚、认同为共和党人，并居住在融合程度更高的社区。经济地位的改善可能部分中介了这些效应。对于南方人而言，这些效应更大，而对于白人退伍军人而言，这些效应精确为零。强制兵役产生了显著但不对称的跨种族政治趋同和种族融合：越战时期的服役导致了受影响群体中约20%的跨种族婚姻。
34900.meta: Programs：DAE, LS, PE；JEL：H56, J12, J15, R21

34946.title: The Heterogeneous Earnings Impact of Job Loss Across Workers, Establishments, and Markets
34946.zh_title: 失业对工人、企业和市场的异质性收入影响
34946.authors: Susan Athey, Lisa K. Simon, Oskar Nordström Skans, Johan Vikström, Yaroslav Yakymovych
34946.abstract: Using rich Swedish administrative data, we apply causal machine learning methods to study how earnings losses after job displacement vary with observable characteristics that may be relevant for targeting policy interventions for workers. Heterogeneity in effects is as large within as across worker groups defined by age and schooling, and as large within as across establishments. A substantial portion of cross-establishment heterogeneity can be explained by industry and local labor market characteristics, suggesting a role for place- and industry-based targeting. The largest losses are concentrated among already vulnerable workers, indicating that well-designed targeting policies can improve both efficiency and equity.
34946.zh_abstract: 利用丰富的瑞典行政数据，我们应用因果机器学习方法研究失业后收入损失如何随可观察特征变化，这些特征可能与针对工人的政策干预目标定位相关。效应的异质性在按年龄和受教育程度划分的工人群体内部与群体之间一样大，在企业内部与企业之间也一样大。跨企业异质性的很大一部分可以由行业和当地劳动力市场特征来解释，这表明基于地点和行业的定位策略可以发挥作用。最大的损失集中在已经脆弱的工人身上，这表明设计良好的定位政策可以提高效率和公平性。

34945.title: The Elasticity of Corporate Taxable Income Across Countries
34945.zh_title: 跨国企业应税收入弹性
34945.authors: Claudio Agostini, Zareh Asatryan, Laurent Bach, Govindadeva Bernier, Marinho Bertanha, Katarzyna A. Bilicka, Anne Brockmeyer, Jaroslav Bukovina, Guillermo Falcone, Pablo Garriga, Yuxuan He, Petr Janský, Evangelos Koumanakos, Tomáš Lichard, Tomás Martins, Ján Palguta, Elena Patel, João Pereira dos Santos, Louis Perrault, Thomas Schwab, Nathan Seegert, Oliver Škultéty, Kristina Strohmaier, Maximilian Todtenhaupt, Guillermo Vuletin, Branislav Žúdel
34945.abstract: Do firms respond similarly to corporate tax incentives across countries? We provide globally comparable estimates of the corporate elasticity of taxable income using administrative tax return data from sixteen countries and a unified empirical framework. Exploiting bunching at a common kink, zero taxable income, we estimate elasticities ranging from 0.08 to 1.9, with an average of 0.79. To explain this heterogeneity, we link elasticities to tax policy, firm characteristics, and country fundamentals. These differences imply that identical corporate tax reforms can generate sharply different revenue effects across countries, leading to substantial heterogeneity in the efficiency costs of corporate taxation.
34945.zh_abstract: 企业是否对不同国家的企业所得税激励措施做出相似的反应？我们利用来自十六个国家的行政纳税申报数据和一个统一的实证框架，提供了具有全球可比性的企业应税收入弹性估计。利用在共同拐点（零应税收入）处的聚集现象，我们估计出的弹性范围从0.08到1.9，平均值为0.79。为了解释这种异质性，我们将弹性与税收政策、企业特征和国家基本面因素联系起来。这些差异意味着，相同的企业所得税改革在不同国家可能产生截然不同的收入效应，从而导致企业所得税效率成本的巨大异质性。

34944.title: Feel as a Determinant of College Choice: Evidence from Campus Tour Weather
34944.zh_title: 感觉作为大学选择的决定因素：来自校园参观天气的证据
34944.authors: Olivia Feldman, Joshua M. Hyman, Matthew L. McGann
34944.abstract: The feeling or impression that students get about enrolling in a particular college may be an important determinant of their college application decision. Combining institutional records on college campus tour participants over the last decade with hourly weather information, we leverage tour weather as a plausibly exogenous shock to students' "feel" for attending the toured college. We find that poor tour weather reduces participants’ likelihood of applying. Tour participants, for example, are 10 percent less likely to apply when their tour is hot and 8 percent less likely when precipitation occurs during their tour. Using administrative data documenting where all tour participants enroll in college, we find that tour weather has little to no impact on the quality or type of college that participants ultimately attend. Nevertheless, our results suggest that students' "feel" for attending a college can play an important role in the college application decision.
34944.zh_abstract: 学生在就读某所特定大学时获得的感觉或印象，可能是其大学申请决策的重要决定因素。结合过去十年大学校园参观参与者的机构记录与逐时天气信息，我们将参观天气作为对学生就读所参观大学“感觉”的一个外生冲击。我们发现，糟糕的参观天气会降低参与者申请的可能性。例如，当参观天气炎热时，参与者申请的可能性降低10%；当参观期间出现降水时，申请可能性降低8%。利用记录所有参观参与者最终就读大学情况的行政数据，我们发现参观天气对参与者最终就读大学的质量或类型几乎没有影响。尽管如此，我们的结果表明，学生对就读某所大学的“感觉”在大学申请决策中可能扮演重要角色。

34943.title: The Changing Landscape of International Development: An Introduction
34943.zh_title: 国际发展格局的变迁：导论
34943.authors: Pascaline Dupas, Pinelopi Koujianou Goldberg, Rohini Pande
34943.abstract: Since the late 1980s, extreme poverty has declined sharply, life expectancy and schooling have increased, and electoral democracy has expanded. However poverty reduction has slowed in recent years, particularly following the COVID-19 pandemic, amid intensifying conflict, fragility, climate risks, democratic backsliding, and the erosion of global trends—including trade integration and geopolitical stability—that once supported growth. These dynamics raise three interrelated questions: what barriers impede further progress; where will future growth in lower-income countries come from; and how can growth be broadly shared. Taking stock of 15 chapters forthcoming in Volume 6 of the Handbook of Development Economics, we discuss how external conditions, state capacity and policy choices shape development; analyze the shifting growth drivers, including trade, technology and the rise of services; discuss persistent inequality and distributional tensions; and conjecture that investing in institutions and people pays off.
34943.zh_abstract: 自20世纪80年代末以来，极端贫困大幅下降，预期寿命和受教育年限有所增加，选举民主得以扩展。然而，近年来减贫速度放缓，尤其是在新冠疫情之后，同时伴随着冲突加剧、脆弱性、气候风险、民主倒退以及曾支撑增长的全球趋势（包括贸易一体化和地缘政治稳定）的侵蚀。这些动态引发了三个相互关联的问题：哪些障碍阻碍了进一步进展；低收入国家未来的增长将从何而来；以及增长如何能被广泛共享。基于对即将出版的《发展经济学手册》第6卷中15个章节的总结，我们讨论了外部条件、国家能力和政策选择如何塑造发展；分析了包括贸易、技术和服务业崛起在内的增长驱动因素的转变；讨论了持续存在的不平等和分配紧张局势；并推测投资于制度和人力资本会带来回报。

34942.title: Dollarization Waves: New Evidence From a Comprehensive International Bond Database
34942.zh_title: 美元化浪潮：来自一个全面国际债券数据库的新证据
34942.authors: Swapan-Kumar Pradhan, Eswar S. Prasad, Előd Takáts, Judit Temesvary
34942.abstract: We investigate how the U.S. dollar’s prominence in the denomination of international debt securities has evolved in recent decades, using a comprehensive global dataset with far more extensive coverage than datasets used in prior literature. We find no monotonic dollarization or de-dollarization trend; instead, the dollar’s share exhibits a wavelike pattern. We document three dollarization waves since the 1960s. The last wave, following the global financial crisis, lifted the dollar’s share nearly back to its level at the euro’s launch in 2000. We show that closer alignment of a country’s domestic currency to a reserve currency (e.g., the U.S. dollar) correlates with higher shares of issuance in that currency. Our findings are robust to composition and currency valuation effects as well as alternative data definitions.
34942.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个覆盖范围远超以往文献所用数据集的全面全球数据集，研究了美元在国际债务证券计价中的主导地位近几十年来如何演变。我们没有发现单调的美元化或去美元化趋势；相反，美元的份额呈现出波浪状模式。我们记录了自20世纪60年代以来的三次美元化浪潮。最近一次浪潮，即全球金融危机之后，将美元的份额几乎推回到了2000年欧元启动时的水平。我们表明，一国本币与储备货币（例如美元）的挂钩程度越紧密，与该国以该货币发行的债券份额越高相关。我们的发现对于构成效应、货币估值效应以及替代性数据定义都是稳健的。

34941.title: Institutional Shocks and Migration Adjustment: Evidence from the Syrian Crisis and Brexit’s Referendum and Implementation
34941.zh_title: 制度冲击与移民调整：来自叙利亚危机以及英国脱欧公投与实施的证据
34941.abstract: This paper interprets Brexit as a two-stage institutional rupture that reshaped migration through expectations, exposure, and stress channels. Using a UK–Germany Difference-in-Differences framework, I show that the 2016 referendum generated a sharp decline in UK net migration relative to Germany, driven primarily by a contraction in immigration rather than simple outward flight. The 2021 termination of EU free movement reinforced this adjustment on the gross inflow margin, completing the structural reallocation of mobility flows. Migration responses were not uniform: countries more deeply integrated into EU mobility networks prior to 2016 experienced significantly stronger contractions, confirming that Brexit propagated along pre-existing exposure channels.
34941.zh_abstract: 本文将英国脱欧解释为一个两阶段的制度断裂，通过预期、暴露和压力渠道重塑了移民格局。利用英国-德国双重差分框架，我表明，与德国相比，2016年公投导致英国净移民急剧下降，这主要是由移民流入的收缩而非简单的向外逃离所驱动。2021年欧盟自由流动的终止在总流入维度上强化了这一调整，完成了流动性流动的结构性重新配置。移民反应并非一致：在2016年之前更深地融入欧盟流动性网络的国家经历了显著更强的收缩，这证实了英国脱欧是沿着既有的暴露渠道传播的。
34941.meta: Programs：AP, IFM；JEL：F0, F29, F47, P0, P5

34940.title: Market Feedback about Emerging Technologies
34940.zh_title: 关于新兴技术的市场反馈
34940.authors: Sean S. Cao, Itay Goldstein, Jie He, Yabo Zhao
34940.abstract: How do firms make decisions on investments in emerging technologies? We find that firms adjust AI/green investments in response to market reactions to announcements of such emerging-technology investment plans. Through a battery of tests, we show that this pattern is more likely due to active managerial learning from the market than alternative explanations such as a passive reflection of underlying fundamentals that drive both market reactions and corporate actions. Firms are more likely to act on feedback about emerging technologies than about other investments, particularly when market participants have more expertise in these areas and when firms face greater uncertainty.
34940.zh_abstract: 企业如何做出关于新兴技术投资的决策？我们发现，企业会根据市场对其宣布此类新兴技术投资计划的反应来调整人工智能/绿色投资。通过一系列检验，我们表明，这种模式更可能是由于管理者主动从市场学习，而非其他解释，例如被动反映同时驱动市场反应和企业行为的潜在基本面。与对其他投资相比，企业更有可能根据关于新兴技术的反馈采取行动，尤其是在市场参与者对这些领域拥有更多专业知识以及企业面临更大不确定性的时候。
34940.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：D22, E22, G14, G31, J23

34939.title: The Skill Premium in Times of Rapid Technological Change
34939.zh_title: 技术快速变革时期的技能溢价
34939.authors: Tarek Alexander Hassan, Aakash Kalyani, Pascual Restrepo
34939.abstract: This paper shows that the pace of technology creation is a key driver of the skill premium. It develops a model in which skilled workers have a comparative advantage in learning new technologies. As technologies age, they become standardized and accessible to other workers. The skill premium is determined by the interplay between the pace of technology creation and standardization. A rapid pace of technology creation leads to a sustained increase in the skill premium. We calibrate the model using novel text-based data on new technologies and their changing demand for skills as they age. These data show that new technologies are initially skill intensive but become less so as they age. The data also point to an increased pace of new technology creation starting in the 1970s and tapering off in the 2000s. In response to this rapid pace of technology creation, the model generates a 32 percent increase in the college premium, which begins to reverse in the 2010s. Our framework also explains why the college premium is higher in dense cities, why its increase was mainly urban, and why it rose first for young workers and later for older workers.
34939.zh_abstract: 本文表明，技术创造的速度是技能溢价的一个关键驱动因素。它构建了一个模型，其中技能型工人在学习新技术方面具有比较优势。随着技术老化，它们变得标准化，其他工人也能掌握。技能溢价由技术创造和标准化的速度之间的相互作用决定。快速的技术创造速度导致技能溢价的持续上升。我们利用基于文本的新技术数据以及这些技术随年龄增长对技能需求的变化来校准模型。这些数据表明，新技术最初是技能密集型的，但随着时间推移会变得不那么技能密集。数据还指出，新技术创造的速度从20世纪70年代开始加快，在21世纪初逐渐放缓。作为对这种快速技术创造速度的回应，该模型产生了32%的大学溢价的增长，这一增长在2010年代开始逆转。我们的框架还解释了为什么大学溢价在人口密集的城市更高，为什么其增长主要发生在城市，以及为什么它首先在年轻工人中上升，后来才在年长工人中上升。

34938.title: Reducing Waste through Anti-Fraud Enforcement: Evidence from Hospital Admission Cases
34938.zh_title: 通过反欺诈执法减少浪费：来自医院入院案例的证据
34938.abstract: The use of federal anti-fraud laws to address unnecessary medical care is controversial. Targeted providers frequently argue that, in their judgment, the treatment in question was appropriate. We examine the effects of anti-fraud litigation against hospitals for over-admitting patients from the emergency department, using 100% Medicare claims for 2005-2019 and a design based on the staggered rollout of these lawsuits. We find that anti-fraud lawsuits reduced admission rates by 3.6 percentage points without increasing mortality rates. We estimate five-year savings to Medicare of $\$1.3$ billion. Our results suggest that anti-fraud enforcement can be successful in reducing costly, unnecessary care.
34938.zh_abstract: 利用联邦反欺诈法律来解决不必要的医疗护理问题是有争议的。被针对的医疗服务提供者经常辩称，根据他们的判断，所涉治疗是适当的。我们利用2005-2019年100%的医疗保险索赔数据，并基于这些诉讼交错推出的设计，研究了针对医院从急诊科过度收治患者的反欺诈诉讼的影响。我们发现，反欺诈诉讼使入院率降低了3.6个百分点，同时并未增加死亡率。我们估计，这为医疗保险在五年内节省了13亿美元。我们的结果表明，反欺诈执法可以成功地减少昂贵且不必要的护理。

34937.title: General Social Agents
34937.authors: Benjamin S. Manning, John J. Horton
34937.abstract: Useful social science theories predict behavior across settings. However, applying a theory to make predictions in new settings is challenging: rarely can it be done without ad hoc modifications to account for setting-specific factors. We argue that AI agents put in simulations of those novel settings offer an alternative for applying theory, requiring minimal or no modifications. We present an approach for building such "general" agents that use theory-grounded natural language instructions, existing empirical data, and knowledge acquired by the underlying AI during training. To demonstrate the approach in settings where no data from that data-generating process exists--as is often the case in applied prediction problems--we design a heterogeneous population of 883,320 novel games. AI agents are constructed using human data from a small set of conceptually related but structurally distinct "seed" games. In preregistered experiments, on average, agents predict initial human play in a random sample of 1,500 games from the population better than (i) a cognitive hierarchy model, (ii) game-theoretic equilibria, and (iii) out-of-the-box agents. For a small set of separate novel games, these simulations predict responses from a new sample of human subjects better even than the most plausibly relevant published human data.
34937.zh_abstract: 有用的社会科学理论能够跨情境预测行为。然而，应用一个理论在新情境中进行预测是具有挑战性的：几乎总是需要针对情境特定因素进行临时修改才能做到。我们认为，置于这些新情境模拟中的人工智能智能体提供了一种应用理论的替代方案，只需最少或无需修改。我们提出了一种构建此类“通用”智能体的方法，该方法使用基于理论的自然语言指令、现有的经验数据以及底层人工智能在训练期间获取的知识。为了在不存在该数据生成过程数据的情境中（这在应用预测问题中经常出现）演示该方法，我们设计了一个包含883,320个新颖游戏的异质性群体。人工智能智能体是利用来自一小部分概念相关但结构不同的“种子”游戏的人类数据构建的。在预注册的实验中，平均而言，这些智能体对来自该群体中随机抽取的1,500个游戏的初始人类行为的预测，优于（i）认知层级模型、（ii）博弈论均衡以及（iii）开箱即用的智能体。对于一小部分独立的新颖游戏，这些模拟对来自新一批人类受试者的反应的预测，甚至优于最可能相关的已发表人类数据。

34936.title: Who Gets What in Education: Can School Matching Improve Student Achievement?
34936.zh_title: 教育中的谁得到什么：学校匹配能否提高学生成绩？
34936.authors: Atila Abdulkadiroglu, Parag A. Pathak, Christopher R. Walters
34936.abstract: We examine two approaches to improving urban school systems: changing who gets to go to existing schools (reallocation) and restructuring school portfolios through closures and reconstitution (resource augmentation). Using data from New York City high schools, we estimate models of school effects allowing for both vertical school quality differences and horizontal student-specific match effects. While sophisticated reallocation policies that optimize student-school matches can generate modest educational gains, they are constrained by limited seats at highly effective schools. Simple resource-augmentation policies targeting replacement of low-performing schools achieve comparable improvements with less systemic disruption. Analysis of NYC's school closures reveals that basic graduation rate metrics effectively identify struggling schools, suggesting complex value-added models may be unnecessary for targeting closure decisions. Our findings indicate that capacity constraints, rather than poor school matching, primarily drive educational inequality.
34936.zh_abstract: 我们研究了改善城市学校系统的两种方法：改变谁可以去现有的学校（重新分配），以及通过关闭和重组来调整学校组合（资源扩充）。利用纽约市高中的数据，我们估计了允许存在纵向学校质量差异和横向学生特定匹配效应的学校效应模型。虽然优化学生-学校匹配的复杂重新分配政策可以产生适度的教育收益，但它们受到高效学校名额有限的制约。针对替换表现不佳学校的简单资源扩充政策，在系统性干扰较小的情况下实现了类似的改进。对纽约市学校关闭的分析表明，基本的毕业率指标能有效识别陷入困境的学校，这表明复杂的增值模型可能并非针对关闭决策所必需。我们的研究结果表明，教育不平等的主要驱动因素是容量限制，而非糟糕的学校匹配。

34935.title: Tariffs, Automation, and Business Dynamism
34935.zh_title: 关税、自动化与商业活力
34935.authors: Stéphane Auray, Michael B. Devereux, Aurélien Eyquem
34935.abstract: Can protectionism revive domestic production, slow automation, and help routine workers? We address this question in a dynamic open-economy model with heterogeneous firms, endogenous entry, and task-based production in which routine tasks can be performed by workers or robots. Import tariffs reallocate demand toward domestic goods, reshape markups and entry incentives, and generate fiscal revenues rebated to households. As a result, tariffs raise GDP and consumption measured at market prices and temporarily slow automation, even though intermediate output at factor prices and trade volumes decline. The gains are unevenly distributed: routine workers benefit robustly through transfers and reduced training, non-routine workers face opposing wage and rebate effects, and firm owners gain in aggregate as higher domestic demand and entry expand total profits despite lower per-firm values. Aggregate welfare gains hinge critically on key assumptions (automation, training, endogenous entry) and on how tariff revenues are rebated. In the baseline with uniform transfers, the welfare-maximizing tariff lies below the classical monopoly formula, while alternative rebate schemes can shift it substantially. Overall, the results caution against viewing tariffs as a simple tool for reindustrialization and highlight the role of technology adoption and fiscal incidence in evaluating protectionist policies.
34935.zh_abstract: 保护主义能否重振国内生产、减缓自动化并帮助从事常规工作的工人？我们在一个包含异质性企业、内生进入和基于任务的生产的动态开放经济模型中探讨这个问题，其中常规任务可以由工人或机器人完成。进口关税将需求重新分配给国内商品，重塑了加成率和进入激励，并产生了返还给家庭部门的财政收入。因此，关税提高了按市场价格衡量的GDP和消费，并暂时减缓了自动化，尽管按要素价格计算的中间产出和贸易量下降了。收益分配不均：常规工人通过转移支付和减少培训而强劲受益，非常规工人面临相反的工资和返还效应，而企业主总体上获益，因为更高的国内需求和进入扩大了总利润，尽管每家企业价值下降。总体福利收益关键取决于关键假设（自动化、培训、内生进入）以及关税收入如何返还。在统一转移支付的基准情况下，福利最大化的关税低于经典的垄断公式，而替代性的返还方案可能使其大幅变动。总体而言，研究结果警示不应将关税视为再工业化的简单工具，并强调了技术采用和财政归宿在评估保护主义政策中的作用。

34934.title: From Complaint to Action: Technology-Enabled Quality Improvement from Consumer Reviews
34934.zh_title: 从投诉到行动：基于消费者评论的技术赋能质量改进
34934.authors: Guangyu Cao, Shenghao He, Ginger Zhe Jin
34934.abstract: This paper examines how adopting an automated review monitoring system (ARMS) allows restaurants to translate consumer feedback into operational quality improvements. ARMS provides automated alerts for negative reviews and facilitates back-end work ticket management, reducing the costs of identifying, prioritizing, and addressing issues revealed by customer feedback. Using restaurant-level data on ARMS adoption and consumer reviews, we find that adoption increases average star ratings, lowers the share of negative reviews, and raises the positivity of review text. These improvements are not driven by strategic manipulation; they are greater for restaurants with lower initial ratings and in dimensions previously flagged as poor by consumers, consistent with the ARMS enhancing restaurant response to negative reviews. We also show that ARMS adoption partially crowds out front-end managerial responses, indicating a substitution between operational remediation and public replies, with the effect strongest when staff take a reflective approach to negative reviews. Finally, adoption is associated with greater consumer engagement, reflected in longer and more detailed reviews. Overall, our results suggest that online review systems, when paired with operational technology, can drive substantive quality improvements beyond mere reputation management.
34934.zh_abstract: 本文研究了采用自动化评论监控系统（ARMS）如何使餐厅将消费者反馈转化为运营质量改进。ARMS为负面评论提供自动提醒，并促进后台工作单管理，降低了识别、优先处理和解决客户反馈所揭示问题的成本。利用关于ARMS采用和消费者评论的餐厅层面数据，我们发现采用ARMS提高了平均星级评分，降低了负面评论的比例，并提高了评论文本的积极性。这些改进并非由策略性操纵驱动；对于初始评分较低的餐厅以及消费者先前指出存在问题的维度，改进幅度更大，这与ARMS增强了餐厅对负面评论的回应能力相一致。我们还表明，采用ARMS部分挤出了前端的经理回应，表明运营补救与公开回复之间存在替代关系，当员工对负面评论采取反思性方法时，这种效应最强。最后，采用ARMS与更高的消费者参与度相关，这体现在更长、更详细的评论中。总体而言，我们的结果表明，在线评论系统与运营技术相结合时，可以推动超越单纯声誉管理的实质性质量改进。

34933.title: Alternatives to 911
34933.abstract: Almost a quarter-billion calls are placed to 911 each year in the United States. A large share of them involve social problems, not crimes or emergencies---yet police are dispatched in response. This review traces how the 911 emergency system's institutional design shapes demand for police, who is excluded from or ill served by this system, and what alternatives exist, including nonemergency lines (with police response), government hotlines (211, 311, 988), civilian crisis teams, and community-based resources. Among the universe of municipal police departments with at least 100 sworn officers in 2020, covering 107 million US residents, police have absorbed broad social service functions, with the availability of formal alternatives restricted to the largest cities. The evidence suggests that the primacy of police reflects institutional reproduction more than public need. I propose priorities for future research.
34933.zh_abstract: 美国每年有近2.5亿个电话拨打给911。其中很大一部分涉及社会问题，而非犯罪或紧急情况——然而警察却被派遣响应。这篇综述追溯了911应急系统的制度设计如何塑造了对警察的需求，谁被排除在这个系统之外或服务不足，以及存在哪些替代方案，包括非紧急热线（由警察响应）、政府热线（211、311、988）、民事危机应对团队和社区资源。在2020年至少拥有100名宣誓警官的市政警察部门（覆盖1.07亿美国居民）中，警察已经吸收了广泛的社会服务职能，而正式替代方案的可用性仅限于最大的城市。证据表明，警察的首要地位更多地反映了制度再生产，而非公共需求。我提出了未来研究的优先事项。
34933.meta: Programs：EH, LE, PE, POL；JEL：H0, I0, K0, P0

34932.title: Personnel is Policy: Delegation and Political Misalignment in the Rulemaking Process
34932.zh_title: 人事即政策：规则制定过程中的授权与政治错位
34932.authors: Luca Bellodi, Massimo Morelli, Jörg L. Spenkuch, Edoardo Teso, Matia Vannoni, Guo Xu
34932.abstract: We combine comprehensive data on the rulemaking activities of the U.S. federal government with individual-level personnel and voter registration records to study delegation and principal-agent frictions in the development of new regulations. We present three main results. First, even important pieces of new regulation are frequently delegated to career bureaucrats who are politically misaligned with the president. Second, rules that are overseen by misaligned regulators take systematically longer to complete, are more verbose, generate more negative feedback from the public, and are more likely to be challenged in court. Third, in assigning regulators to rules, agency leaders often face a sharp trade-off between political alignment and expertise. Agency frictions notwithstanding, they tend to resolve this trade-off in favor of expertise.
34932.zh_abstract: 我们将美国联邦政府规则制定活动的综合数据与个人层面的人事和选民登记记录相结合，研究新法规制定过程中的授权和委托-代理摩擦。我们提出三个主要结果。首先，即使是重要的新法规，也经常被授权给与总统政治立场不一致的职业官僚。其次，由错位的监管者监督的规则，其完成时间系统性更长，措辞更冗长，产生的公众负面反馈更多，并且更有可能在法庭上受到挑战。第三，在将监管者分配到规则时，机构领导经常面临政治立场与专业知识之间的尖锐权衡。尽管存在机构摩擦，他们倾向于以有利于专业知识的方式解决这一权衡。
34932.meta: Programs：LE, PE, POL；JEL：D73, H1, K2, L5, M5, P0

34931.title: Imitation, Reciprocity, and Community Structure in Norm Transmission: Evidence from Teachers and Students
34931.zh_title: 当教师违反规则时：道德行为传播中的模仿、互惠与社区结构
34931.abstract: We study how teachers' rule violations in grading affect students' ethical behavior. Using administrative data from high-stakes exams, combining teacher-assigned internal scores with externally graded national exam scores, we track teacher grading violations and subsequent student cheating. We explore three potential mechanisms: imitation (learning that rules can be broken), positive reciprocity (responding favorably to favorable treatment), and negative reciprocity (retaliating against unfavorable treatment). Exploiting within-student variation in exposure to different teachers, we find students are significantly more likely to cheat when teachers break the rules to their detriment (systematically undergrading), consistent with both imitation and negative reciprocity. However, when teachers systematically overgrade, responses vary by community structure. In heterogeneous communities, overgrading increases student cheating, suggesting imitation dominates. In homogeneous communities, students respond by cheating less, consistent with positive reciprocity dominating. This pattern holds across multiple homogeneity measures, including surname concentration and residential clustering. Survey measures of mutual respect and support between students and teachers confirm this pattern.
34931.zh_abstract: 我们研究教师在评分中的违规行为如何影响学生的道德行为。利用高风险考试的管理数据，结合教师评定的内部分数与外部评分的国家考试分数，我们追踪教师的评分违规行为以及随后的学生作弊行为。我们探讨了三种潜在机制：模仿（了解到规则可以被打破）、正向互惠（对有利待遇做出积极回应）和负向互惠（对不利待遇进行报复）。利用学生接触不同教师的内部差异，我们发现当教师以对学生不利的方式违反规则（系统性低分）时，学生作弊的可能性显著增加，这与模仿和负向互惠均一致。然而，当教师系统性给高分时，学生的反应因社区结构而异。在异质性社区中，给高分增加了学生作弊，表明模仿占主导地位。在同质性社区中，学生通过减少作弊来回应，这与正向互惠占主导地位一致。这一模式在多种同质性衡量指标（包括姓氏集中度和居住聚类）中均成立。关于学生与教师之间相互尊重和支持的调查测量证实了这一模式。
34931.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS, POL；JEL：I20, J00

34930.title: When Do Financial Frictions Matter for Misallocation?
34930.zh_title: 金融摩擦何时对资源错配重要？
34930.authors: Yan Bai, Dan Lu, Xu Tian, Yajie Wang
34930.abstract: This paper reassesses the role of financial frictions in capital misallocation through a model disciplined by both firm-level borrowing costs and the average revenue product of capital (ARPK). Using Chinese manufacturing data, we document substantial dispersion in ARPK, alongside a strong positive relationship between ARPK and the borrowing costs firms face---patterns absent in U.S. data. We develop a heterogeneous-firm model with endogenous firm-specific borrowing costs and additional capital distortions modeled as exogenous wedges. In this model, eliminating financial frictions raises total factor productivity (TFP) by 25 percentage points. In contrast, without other capital distortions, removing financial frictions increases TFP by less than 2 percentage points. The stark difference arises from the interaction between financial frictions and permanent firm-level distortions, which generate endogenous financial heterogeneity and selection, making productive firms the most constrained. Our findings suggest that financial frictions can be highly distortionary when other sources of misallocation are present.
34930.zh_abstract: 本文通过一个由企业层面借贷成本和资本平均收入产品（ARPK）共同约束的模型，重新评估了金融摩擦在资本错配中的作用。利用中国制造业数据，我们记录了ARPK的巨大离散性，以及ARPK与企业面临的借贷成本之间的强正相关关系——这些模式在美国数据中不存在。我们开发了一个异质性企业模型，其中包含内生的企业特定借贷成本以及建模为外生楔子的额外资本扭曲。在该模型中，消除金融摩擦使全要素生产率（TFP）提高了25个百分点。相比之下，在没有其他资本扭曲的情况下，消除金融摩擦使TFP提高了不到2个百分点。这种显著差异源于金融摩擦与永久性企业层面扭曲之间的相互作用，后者产生了内生的金融异质性和选择效应，使得高生产率企业受到最大的约束。我们的研究结果表明，当存在其他错配来源时，金融摩擦可能具有高度的扭曲性。

34929.title: Restoring Nature, Creating Wealth: Evidence from Rural Households in Africa
34929.zh_title: 恢复自然，创造财富：来自非洲农村家庭的证据
34929.authors: Geoffrey Heal, Claudio Rizzi, Simon Xu
34929.abstract: Human-driven degradation of ecosystems threatens both global biodiversity and the livelihoods of communities that depend on natural systems for production and income. Yet empirical evidence on the economic returns to restoring nature remains scarce. We examine whether nature-enhancing interventions can generate measurable improvements in household wealth, in addition to environmental benefits. We study a large-scale agroecological intervention implemented by Trees for the Future (TREES) across farms in sub-Saharan Africa, combining detailed household surveys with high-resolution satellite imagery. We show that quasi-exogenous increases in natural capital lead to substantial gains in household wealth, proxied by livestock ownership, of about 75% by the third year of treatment. Each dollar invested in the intervention returns about $\$2.28$ in direct wealth benefits for participating farmers, before accounting for positive health impacts and carbon sequestration. We further document dramatic increases in tree cover and crop diversity, significant improvements in food security and dietary diversity, and detectable enhancements in vegetation indices measured from space. Together, these results demonstrate that restoring natural capital generates both ecological and economic returns, offering a scalable pathway for nature-positive development in rural economies where biodiversity remains a critical productive asset.
34929.zh_abstract: 人类驱动的生态系统退化威胁着全球生物多样性以及依赖自然系统进行生产和创收的社区生计。然而，关于恢复自然的经济回报的实证证据仍然稀缺。我们研究了增强自然的干预措施是否能在环境效益之外，为家庭财富带来可衡量的改善。我们研究了由“树木未来”（TREES）组织在撒哈拉以南非洲的农场实施的大规模农业生态干预措施，结合了详细的家庭调查和高分辨率卫星图像。我们表明，自然资本的准外生增长导致家庭财富（以牲畜拥有量为代理指标）大幅增加，到干预的第三年增长约75%。在考虑积极的健康影响和碳封存之前，每投入一美元干预措施，参与农户可获得约2.28美元的直接财富收益。我们进一步记录了树木覆盖率和作物多样性的显著增加，粮食安全和膳食多样性的显著改善，以及从太空测量的植被指数的可检测提升。这些结果共同表明，恢复自然资本既能产生生态回报，也能产生经济回报，为生物多样性仍是关键生产性资产的农村经济提供了一条可扩展的自然积极发展路径。

34928.title: Competition in Health Insurance Markets
34928.abstract: The United States relies primarily on private health insurance markets, yet these markets are highly concentrated and becoming more so over time. We document concentration across commercial, Medicare Advantage, and Medicaid markets. We then examine how asymmetric information—particularly adverse selection—interacts with market power to shape premiums, plan design, and consumer welfare. Empirical evidence confirms that insurer consolidation raises premiums. We discuss how antitrust enforcement, risk adjustment, regulation, and informational interventions shape competition and consumer welfare in these markets.
34928.zh_abstract: 美国主要依赖私人健康保险市场，然而这些市场高度集中，并且随着时间的推移集中度越来越高。我们记录了商业、医疗保险优势计划和医疗补助市场的集中度。然后，我们研究了信息不对称——特别是逆向选择——如何与市场势力相互作用，从而影响保费、计划设计和消费者福利。实证证据证实，保险公司的整合会提高保费。我们讨论了反垄断执法、风险调整、监管和信息干预如何在这些市场中塑造竞争和消费者福利。

34927.title: The Effects of a Sudden Stop in Low-Skilled Immigration: Evidence from Korea’s Guest Worker Program
34927.zh_title: 低技能移民突然停止的影响：来自韩国客工计划的证据
34927.authors: Jongkwan Lee, Giovanni Peri, Hee-Seung Yang
34927.abstract: As workforces in high-income countries age and shrink, immigrants increasingly fill entry-level, low-skilled jobs. We examine what happens when this labor supply is abruptly reduced, exploiting South Korea’s sudden suspension of its low-skilled guest worker program following the 2020 COVID-19 border closure. Using policy-driven variation in firms’ pre-pandemic reliance on immigrant labor, we show that the collapse in inflows led to a significant increase in firm exit. Among surviving firms, greater pre-pandemic dependence on immigrant workers resulted in production disruptions and operational delays. Firms did not respond by expanding domestic hiring to replace missing guest workers. Instead, they adjusted by reallocating incumbent Korean employees toward lower-skilled tasks, contributing to occupational downgrading and significant wage declines. These findings suggest that low-skilled immigrant workers were not easily substitutable in the short run and that tighter immigration constraints can impose substantial adjustment costs on both firms and native workers.
34927.zh_abstract: 随着高收入国家的劳动力队伍老龄化和萎缩，移民越来越多地填补入门级、低技能的工作岗位。我们研究了当这种劳动力供给突然减少时会发生什么，利用了韩国在2020年新冠疫情边境关闭后突然暂停其低技能客工计划的情况。利用企业在疫情前对移民劳动力依赖程度的政策驱动差异，我们表明，流入量的骤降导致企业退出显著增加。在幸存企业中，疫情前对移民工人依赖程度更高导致了生产中断和运营延误。企业并未通过扩大国内招聘来填补缺失的客工。相反，它们通过将现有的韩国员工重新分配到技能要求更低的任务来进行调整，这导致了职业降级和显著的工资下降。这些发现表明，低技能移民工人在短期内不易被替代，并且更严格的移民限制可能会给企业和本土工人带来巨大的调整成本。

34926.title: Repression
34926.authors: Gerard Padró I Miquel, Nancy Qian
34926.abstract: Removed at the request of the authors. An updated version will be posted shortly.
34926.zh_abstract: 应作者要求移除。更新版本将很快发布。

34925.title: The Micro-Geography of Persuasion: Randomized Peer Exposure and Legislative Outcomes
34925.zh_title: 说服的微观地理学：随机同伴暴露与立法结果
34925.abstract: We find that randomly assigned peers play a sizable and unique role in shaping political economy. Closely seated, and exogenously assigned, US Senate peers have a significant impact on Congressional voting, shifting votes by 11.9 percentage points (t=7.34). Physical distance is the largest and most consistent of any characteristic outside of party or state in impacting voting behavior. The distance effect is concentrated in the closest peers, existing for up to 19.6 feet on the Senate floor, then dissipating. Close peers additionally increase the probability of aisle-crossing (voting with the opposite party), with the aisle-crossing impact being roughly eight times larger on the final votes on bills. We then utilize a state-of-the-art AI-enhanced computer vision model based on real-time interactions using CSPAN video data at every 10-second interval amongst Congressional members. Using these observed interactions, we find that face-to-face interactions are associated with significant impacts on immediately pending votes. The interactions are largely driven by distance, with aisle-seated Senators from both parties being amongst the most likely to engage in face-to-face interactions across party lines. By conducting counterfactuals through randomized Senate seating, 59 consequential bills would have switched outcomes over our 30-year sample period.
34925.zh_abstract: 我们发现，随机分配的同伴在塑造政治经济学方面发挥着巨大且独特的作用。座位相邻且外生分配的美国参议院同伴对国会投票产生了显著影响，使投票偏移了11.9个百分点（t=7.34）。在影响投票行为的任何特征中，除了党派或州之外，物理距离是影响最大且最一致的因素。距离效应集中在最近的同伴身上，在参议院会场内最远可达19.6英尺，之后便消散。近距离同伴还增加了跨党派投票（与对立党派一起投票）的可能性，在法案的最终投票中，跨党派投票的影响大约是其八倍。然后，我们利用了一个基于CSPAN视频数据、每10秒间隔捕捉国会成员间实时互动的、最先进的人工智能增强计算机视觉模型。通过这些观察到的互动，我们发现面对面互动对即将表决的投票产生了显著影响。这些互动很大程度上是由距离驱动的，来自两党的靠过道就座的参议员是最有可能进行跨党派面对面互动的群体之一。通过随机安排参议院座次进行反事实模拟，在我们的30年样本期内，有59项重要法案的结果会发生改变。
34925.meta: Programs：LE, PE, POL；JEL：C53, C82, D72, D78, D82, H10, P0

34924.title: Measuring Payroll Employment: A Note on the Current Employment Statistics
34924.zh_title: 衡量薪资就业：关于当前就业统计的说明
34924.abstract: The Bureau of Labor Statistics Current Employment Statistics (CES) is a high-quality, closely watched indicator of labor market health and the business cycle. Recent revisions to CES data have garnered significant attention. I provide a primer on CES methodology and analyze recent survey response and data revision patterns. CES revisions actually tend to be small, but they have increased in recent years. I discuss potential ideas for improving the CES including expanding the data sample with internal or external data, adjusting the estimates with benchmark data more often, and enhancing estimation of establishment birth and death.
34924.zh_abstract: 劳工统计局当前就业统计（CES）是一个高质量、备受关注的劳动力市场健康状况和商业周期指标。近期对CES数据的修订引起了广泛关注。我提供了CES方法的入门介绍，并分析了近期的调查响应和数据修订模式。实际上，CES的修订往往很小，但近年来有所增加。我讨论了改进CES的潜在想法，包括利用内部或外部数据扩大数据样本、更频繁地使用基准数据调整估计值，以及改进对机构成立和倒闭的估算。

34923.title: Why People Disagree About What Drives Stock Prices
34923.zh_title: 为什么人们对股票价格的驱动因素存在分歧
34923.authors: Andrew Atkeson, Fabrizio Perri, Jonathan Heathcote
34923.abstract: We show that, to a first-order approximation, estimates of fluctuations in Shiller’s fundamental price relative to observed price depend primarily on forecasts of long-horizon expected returns. Researchers using different measures of cash flow and valuation may reach different conclusions about the extent to which values fluctuate excessively relative to fundamentals, but that is only because return forecasts based on different cash-flow-to-value measures will be different. Using U.S. equity data, we demonstrate that the amount of persistence in expected returns, rather than the amount of short-run return predictability, is the key determinant of implied excess volatility. Disagreements about stock market valuation therefore reduce to disagreements about long-run expected returns.
34923.zh_abstract: 我们表明，在一阶近似下，对席勒基础价格相对于观察价格波动的估计，主要取决于对长期预期收益的预测。使用不同现金流和估值指标的研究人员可能会得出关于价值相对于基本面过度波动程度的不同结论，但这仅仅是因为基于不同现金流-价值比率的收益预测会有所不同。利用美国股票数据，我们证明了预期收益的持续性程度，而非短期收益可预测性的程度，是隐含过度波动性的关键决定因素。因此，关于股票市场估值的分歧归结为对长期预期收益的分歧。

34922.title: The Labor Market Consequences of Rapid Sectoral Shifts
34922.zh_title: 快速部门转移的劳动力市场后果
34922.abstract: Sectoral shifts require costly labor reallocation for workers, fueling concerns about how quickly they occur. We study how the pace of such sectoral shifts affects workers at risk of displacement. We develop a life-cycle model with skill heterogeneity and job ladders where labor demand gradually rises in one sector and declines in another. The model reveals three novel insights. First, workers’ lifetime earnings are strongly non-linear and even nonmonotonic in the horizon over which the transition unfolds. Second, more and more workers benefit on the extensive margin as the transition accelerates, but the tail of losses becomes thicker on the intensive margin. Third, labor market frictions are important to quantify these non-linearities. We apply our model to the climate transition and find substantial earnings losses from a transition ending in 2060. Completing the transition ten years earlier reduces average losses, but raises losses in the tail by a fifth.
34922.zh_abstract: 部门转移要求工人进行代价高昂的劳动力重新配置，这加剧了人们对转移发生速度的担忧。我们研究了这种部门转移的速度如何影响面临失业风险的工人。我们开发了一个具有技能异质性和工作阶梯的生命周期模型，其中劳动力需求在一个部门逐渐上升，在另一个部门逐渐下降。该模型揭示了三个新颖的见解。首先，工人的终生收入在转型展开的时间跨度上呈现出强烈的非线性，甚至是非单调性。其次，随着转型加速，越来越多的工人在广延边际上受益，但在集约边际上损失的尾部变得更厚。第三，劳动力市场摩擦对于量化这些非线性至关重要。我们将模型应用于气候转型，发现到2060年结束的转型会导致可观的收入损失。提前十年完成转型会降低平均损失，但会使尾部损失增加五分之一。
34922.meta: Programs：EFG；JEL：E0, E20, E24, E60, E64, J20, J23, J24, J3, J62, Q52, Q58

34921.title: The Market Value of Reproductive Rights: Evidence from U.S. Housing Markets
34921.zh_title: 生育权的市场价值：来自美国住房市场的证据
34921.authors: Daniel L. Dench, Kelly Lifchez, Jason M. Lindo, Jancy Ling Liu
34921.abstract: We estimate the market value of reproductive rights as capitalized into U.S. housing markets. We do so using a synthetic difference-in-differences design to evaluate the effects of total abortion bans following the 2022 Dobbs decision, and drawing on housing market indices from Zillow and vacancy rate data from the U.S. Census Bureau's Housing Vacancy Survey. The results indicate that total abortion bans reduced rents by an average of 2.2% from July 2022 through June 2025, with the effect reaching 4.0% in the most recent year. Over the same horizon, bans increased rental vacancy rates by an average of 1.1 percentage points, with the effect reaching 1.8 percentage points in the most recent year. Estimates for home values and homeowner vacancy rates are similar in magnitude but less precise.
34921.zh_abstract: 我们估算了生育权资本化到美国住房市场中的市场价值。我们采用合成双重差分设计来评估2022年多布斯案判决后全面堕胎禁令的影响，并利用了Zillow的住房市场指数和美国人口普查局住房空置调查的空置率数据。结果表明，从2022年7月到2025年6月，全面堕胎禁令使租金平均降低了2.2%，在最近一年内影响达到4.0%。在同一时期，禁令使租赁空置率平均增加了1.1个百分点，在最近一年内影响达到1.8个百分点。对房屋价值和业主空置率的估计在幅度上相似，但精确度较低。
34921.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：I18, J13, K23, R21, R23, R31

34920.title: Mergers and Non-contractible Benefits: The Employees' Perspective
34920.zh_title: 并购与非契约性利益：员工视角
34920.authors: Wei Cai, Andrea Prat, Jiehang Yu
34920.abstract: Incomplete contract theory, supported by anecdotal evidence, suggests that when a firm is acquired, workers may be adversely affected in non-contractible aspects of their work experience. This paper empirically investigates this prediction by combining M\\&A events from the Refinitiv database and web-scraped Glassdoor review data. We find that: (a) Controlling for pre-trends, mergers lead to lower satisfaction, especially on non-contractible dimensions of the employee experience (about 6% of a standard deviation); (b) The effect is stronger in the target firm than in the acquiring firm; (c) Text analysis of employee comments indicates that the decline in satisfaction is primarily associated with perceived breaches of implicit contracts. Our findings indicate that mergers may reduce workers' job utility through non-monetary channels.
34920.zh_abstract: 不完全契约理论（并有轶事证据支持）表明，当一家公司被收购时，员工在工作体验的非契约性方面可能会受到不利影响。本文通过结合 Refinitiv 数据库中的并购事件和网络爬取的 Glassdoor 评论数据，对这一预测进行了实证研究。我们发现：(a) 在控制事前趋势的情况下，并购导致员工满意度下降，尤其是在员工体验的非契约性维度上（约 0.06 个标准差）；(b) 这种效应在目标公司中比在收购公司中更强；(c) 对员工评论的文本分析表明，满意度的下降主要与感知到的隐性契约被违背有关。我们的研究结果表明，并购可能通过非货币渠道降低员工的工作效用。

34919.title: How does AI Distribute the pie? Large Language Models and the Ultimatum Game.
34919.zh_title: 人工智能如何分配蛋糕？大语言模型与最后通牒博弈
34919.abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly tasked with autonomous decision making, understanding their behavior in strategic settings is crucial. We investigate the choices of various LLMs in the Ultimatum Game, a setting where human behavior notably deviates from theoretical rationality. We conduct experiments varying the stake size and the nature of the opponent (Human vs. AI) across both Proposer and Responder roles. Three key results emerge. First, LLM behavior is heterogeneous but predictable when conditioning on stake size and player types. Second, while some models approximate the rational benchmark and others mimic human social preferences, a distinct “altruistic” mode emerges where LLMs propose hyper-fair distributions (greater than 50%). Third, LLM Proposers forgo a large share of total payoff, and an even larger share when the Responder is human. These findings highlight the need for careful testing before deploying AI agents in economic settings.
34919.zh_abstract: 随着大语言模型越来越多地承担自主决策任务，理解它们在战略环境中的行为至关重要。我们研究了各种大语言模型在最后通牒博弈中的选择，这是一个人类行为显著偏离理论理性的场景。我们通过实验改变了赌注大小和对手的性质（人类 vs. 人工智能），并涵盖了提议者和回应者两种角色。出现了三个关键结果。首先，大语言模型的行为是异质性的，但在以赌注大小和玩家类型为条件时是可预测的。其次，虽然一些模型接近理性基准，另一些模型模仿人类的社会偏好，但出现了一种独特的“利他”模式，即大语言模型提出超公平分配方案（大于 50%）。第三，作为提议者的大语言模型放弃了总收益的很大一部分，当回应者是人类时，放弃的份额甚至更大。这些发现强调了在将人工智能代理部署到经济环境中之前进行仔细测试的必要性。

34918.title: Pay Now, Buy Never: The Economics of Consumer Prepayment Schemes
34918.zh_title: 现在付款，永不消费：消费者预付计划的经济学
34918.authors: Yixuan Liu, Hua Zhang, Eric Zou
34918.abstract: Prepaid consumption is a common feature of modern consumer markets and is often presented as a mutually beneficial arrangement: consumers receive upfront discounts, and firms secure future sales. We analyze a large-scale Pay Now, Buy Later (PNBL) program in which consumers prepay for restaurant credit with bonuses, and spend the balance later. Using detailed transaction data from over 4 million consumers, we document widespread balance breakage: approximately 40% of prepaid value is never used. Because many consumers underutilize their balances, merchants recover significantly more than the bonus cost. The median firm earns roughly $\$5.5$ in breakage profit for every $\$1$ of bonus credit issued. While PNBL participation does lead to modest increases in consumer spending over time, firms gain substantially more from breakage than from any loyalty-driven revenue. These findings challenge the prevailing win–win narrative: PNBL schemes often result in a significant transfer from consumers to firms. We develop a stylized contract model to illustrate the misaligned incentives firms face, and show through counterfactual analysis that a simple escrow policy with an appropriately chosen deposit requirement can realign firm incentives and generate more consumer-serving outcomes.
34918.zh_abstract: 预付消费是现代消费市场的一个常见特征，通常被描述为一种互利的安排：消费者获得预付折扣，企业确保未来销售。我们分析了一个大规模的“现在付款，以后消费”计划，在该计划中，消费者预付资金以获取餐厅消费积分和奖励，并在之后使用余额。利用超过 400 万消费者的详细交易数据，我们记录了广泛的余额破损现象：大约 40% 的预付价值从未被使用。由于许多消费者未充分利用其余额，商家收回的资金远超奖励成本。中位数企业每发放 1 美元的奖励积分，就能获得大约 5.5 美元的破损利润。虽然参与“现在付款，以后消费”计划确实会导致消费者支出随时间适度增加，但企业从破损中获得的收益远大于任何由忠诚度驱动的收入。这些发现挑战了普遍的双赢叙事：“现在付款，以后消费”计划通常导致从消费者到企业的显著财富转移。我们开发了一个简约的契约模型来说明企业面临的激励错位，并通过反事实分析表明，一项简单的、包含适当存款要求的托管政策可以重新调整企业激励，并产生更有利于消费者的结果。
34918.meta: Programs：PE；JEL：D12, D90, G23, G41, K20, L14, L81, M31

34917.title: When Incentives Aren't Enough: Evidence on Inattention and Imperfect Memory from HIV Medication Adherence
34917.zh_title: 当激励不足时：来自HIV药物依从性的关于注意力不集中和记忆不完美的证据
34917.authors: Hang Yu, Jared Stolove, Dean Yang, James Riddell IV, Arlete Mahumane
34917.abstract: Financial incentives are widely used to encourage beneficial behaviors, but their effectiveness may be limited by inattention and imperfect memory. We study this in a randomized trial of HIV medication adherence in Mozambique. Financial incentives alone increase adherence by 10.6 percentage points, while pairing incentives with reminders increases adherence by 24.3 percentage points. We develop a model in which inattention to daily adherence and imperfect memory of payment eligibility reduce incentive effectiveness and show that reminders mitigate both frictions. Detailed medication refill data support the model’s predictions. The results suggest combining incentives with reminders can substantially increase program effectiveness.
34917.zh_abstract: 经济激励被广泛用于鼓励有益行为，但其有效性可能受到注意力不集中和记忆不完美的限制。我们在莫桑比克进行的一项关于HIV药物依从性的随机试验中研究了这一点。仅提供经济激励使依从性提高了 10.6 个百分点，而将激励与提醒相结合则使依从性提高了 24.3 个百分点。我们开发了一个模型，其中对每日服药依从性的注意力不集中和对付款资格的记忆不完美降低了激励的有效性，并表明提醒可以缓解这两种摩擦。详细的药物补充数据支持了该模型的预测。结果表明，将激励与提醒相结合可以显著提高项目的有效性。

34971.title: The max EPS Paradigm for Corporate Finance
34971.zh_title: 公司金融的最大每股收益范式
34971.abstract: There are three classic problems in corporate finance: capital structure, real investment, and payout policy. In three companion papers, we characterize the max EPS solution to each one. The max EPS approach delivers an optimal leverage ratio even in the absence of frictions, an investment rule based on comparing yields rather than using a risk-adjusted discount rate, and a payout policy where accretive buybacks are preferred to neutral dividends. Our max EPS model draws a bright line between growth and value. Growth stocks have earnings yields below the riskfree rate; value stocks have earnings yields above it. This single comparison leads the two kinds of firms to pursue different constellations of EPS-maximizing policies. The model also produces easy-to-follow calculations that closely mirror what practitioners actually do. This review article ties together these results to form a new max EPS paradigm for corporate-finance research.
34971.zh_abstract: 公司金融中有三个经典问题：资本结构、实际投资和股利政策。在三篇配套论文中，我们分别描述了每个问题的最大EPS解决方案。最大EPS方法即使在无摩擦的情况下也能提供最优杠杆率，一个基于比较收益率而非使用风险调整贴现率的投资规则，以及一个偏好增值性股票回购而非中性股息的股利政策。我们的最大EPS模型在成长股和价值股之间划出了一条清晰的界限。成长股的盈利收益率低于无风险利率；价值股的盈利收益率高于无风险利率。这一单一比较导致这两类公司追求不同的EPS最大化政策组合。该模型还产生了易于遵循的计算方法，与从业者的实际做法非常接近。这篇综述文章将这些结果联系起来，为公司金融研究形成了一个新的最大EPS范式。
34971.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：G12, G31, G32, G35, M41

34970.title: Loaded Chambers: Organized Interests, Public Opinion, and Policy Responsiveness in the American States
34970.zh_title: 上膛的议院：美国各州中的组织利益、公众意见与政策回应性
34970.authors: Takuma Iwasaki, Eric A. Baldwin, John J. Donohue, Tai Markman
34970.abstract: Organized interests are thought to influence policy, but whether and when interest group money overrides public opinion remains poorly understood. We investigate how gun interest group money and public opinion shape state gun laws. To test which force drives policy, we link 25 years of campaign finance records to a novel Gun Law Index paired with original estimates of constituent sentiment, 2000--2024. We show that pro-gun contributions produce deregulatory changes under Republican trifectas, while gun safety contributions generate regulatory tightening under Democratic trifectas. Using an instrumental variable design, we find that constituent sentiment does not causally predict policy change under Republican or Democratic trifectas. We document one of the most striking failures of democratic responsiveness in the history of the American Republic: while the twelve states in which universal background checks command at least 90% support have adopted them, only 8 other states have done so among the 36 states that have support between 80-90%, while assault weapons bans and concealed carry restrictions also enjoy durable majority support across 36 states, yet there has been far greater deregulation than regulation for both measures. These patterns provide unequivocal evidence that organized interests, rather than constituent preferences, drive gun policy in the United States.
34970.zh_abstract: 人们认为组织利益会影响政策，但利益集团资金何时以及是否会凌驾于公众意见之上，这一点仍知之甚少。我们研究了枪支利益集团资金和公众意见如何塑造各州的枪支法律。为了检验哪种力量驱动政策，我们将25年的竞选财务记录与一个新的枪支法律指数以及2000-2024年选民情绪的原始估计值联系起来。我们表明，在共和党一党控制州政府的情况下，支持枪支的捐款会产生放松管制的变革，而枪支安全捐款在民主党一党控制州政府的情况下会产生加强管制的变革。使用工具变量设计，我们发现，在共和党或民主党一党控制州政府的情况下，选民情绪并不能因果性地预测政策变化。我们记录了美利坚共和国历史上民主回应性最显著的失败之一：虽然普遍背景调查获得至少90%支持的12个州已经采纳了该政策，但在支持率在80-90%之间的36个州中，只有8个其他州也这样做了，同时，攻击性武器禁令和隐蔽携带限制在36个州也享有持久的多数支持，然而这两项措施出现的放松管制远远多于加强管制。这些模式提供了明确的证据，表明在美国，是组织利益而非选民偏好驱动了枪支政策。
34970.meta: Programs：LE, POL；JEL：C21, C23, C36, D72, D78, H70, I18, K14, K16, P10

34969.title: Household Preferences for Women’s Employment: A Field Experiment in Bangladesh
34969.zh_title: 家庭对女性就业的偏好：孟加拉国的一项实地实验
34969.authors: Yueh-ya Hsu, Reshmaan N. Hussam, Erin M. Kelley, Gregory Lane
34969.abstract: This paper investigates household preferences over who should work and whether these preferences are malleable. We document that men and women prefer that husbands work over wives. To understand why, we randomly assign a six-week job to either the husband or wife and document asymmetry: women’s work improves their own wellbeing but not their husbands’, while men’s work improves both partners’ wellbeing. One year later, we surprise households with a work opportunity. Both women and men in households where women were previously employed are more likely to prefer the woman take the job and express fewer concerns about women’s employment in general.
34969.zh_abstract: 本文研究了家庭对谁应该工作的偏好，以及这些偏好是否具有可塑性。我们记录了男性和女性都更偏好丈夫工作而非妻子工作。为了理解原因，我们随机将一份为期六周的工作分配给丈夫或妻子，并记录了不对称性：女性的工作改善了她们自身的福祉，但没有改善其丈夫的福祉；而男性的工作则改善了伴侣双方的福祉。一年后，我们给这些家庭一个意外的工作机会。在女性之前有工作的家庭中，女性和男性都更倾向于让女性接受这份工作，并且对女性就业总体上表达了更少的担忧。

34968.title: The Global Incumbency Advantage
34968.authors: Raphaël Descamps, Benjamin Marx, Vincent Pons, Vincent Rollet
34968.abstract: This paper explores the global incumbency advantage. We first show that existing subnational estimates of the incumbency advantage correlate positively with GDP per capita and democratic quality, and negatively with corruption across countries. Building on this meta-analysis, we then consider all presidential and parliamentary elections held since 1945 to estimate how a national electoral victory affects the probability that winning parties and candidates retain power beyond the term for which they were elected. On average, national election winners benefit from an incumbency advantage, but this effect is short-lived and differs markedly across contexts: it is large in Africa, North America, and Western Europe, but muted or even reversed in other regions. We explore how standard incumbency effects and electoral manipulation contribute to these results. In established democracies, the national incumbency advantage reflects gains in the subsequent electoral performance of election winners. In less democratic regimes, it mainly stems from manipulation of the fairness and the timing of elections. Overall, this advantage is largest in both the most and the least democratic countries, due to radically different types of equilibria.
34968.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了全球范围内的在位者优势。我们首先表明，现有的次国家级在位者优势估计值与各国的人均GDP和民主质量呈正相关，与腐败呈负相关。基于这项元分析，我们随后考察了自1945年以来举行的所有总统和议会选举，以估计全国性选举胜利如何影响获胜政党和候选人在其当选任期之后继续掌权的概率。平均而言，全国选举的获胜者受益于在位者优势，但这种效应是短暂的，并且在不同情境下存在显著差异：在非洲、北美和西欧，这种效应很大，但在其他地区则较弱甚至逆转。我们探讨了标准的在位者效应和选举操纵如何促成这些结果。在成熟的民主国家，全国性的在位者优势反映了选举获胜者在后续选举表现中的收益。在民主程度较低的政体中，这种优势主要源于对选举公平性和选举时机的操纵。总体而言，由于截然不同的均衡类型，这种优势在民主程度最高和最低的国家中都是最大的。

34967.title: Mutual Party Extremism
34967.abstract: With four political candidates competing first in two primaries and then in a general election, even a modestly polarized electorate can sustain (in equilibrium) much more extremist candidates. However, a party can sustain extremism only if the other side is extreme, too. A small moderation of one side’s voting electorate can trigger a discontinuous collapse of candidate extremism on both sides — a “moderation export” effect. The converse is also true: minute increases in voter polarization on the more moderate side can trigger radical candidate extremism on both sides. Principled candidates can destroy party electability. Distance-related voter abstention favors extremism.
34967.zh_abstract: 当四位政治候选人首先在两场初选、随后在大选中竞争时，即使是适度两极分化的选民群体也能（在均衡中）维持更为极端的候选人。然而，一个政党只有在另一方也极端的情况下才能维持极端主义。一方选民群体的轻微温和化，可能引发双方候选人极端主义的非连续性崩溃——即一种“温和输出”效应。反之亦然：较温和一方选民两极分化的微小增加，可能引发双方候选人激进的极端主义。有原则的候选人可能摧毁政党的可选性。与距离相关的选民弃权有利于极端主义。

34966.title: Life Cycle Portfolio Choice with Human Capital and Social Security
34966.zh_title: 考虑人力资本与社会保障的生命周期投资组合选择
34966.authors: Jason Scott, John B. Shoven, Sita Slavov, John G. Watson
34966.abstract: Target date funds – which initially invest a large share of retirement savings in stocks and shift gradually towards bonds over the life cycle – are designed to provide a “one stop shop” for retirement investing. The rationale for this pattern is that human capital, which is highest at the start of a worker’s career, is “bond-like.” Thus, utility is maximized when financial wealth is initially invested primarily in stocks, with the investment mix shifting towards bonds as the present value of future labor income declines. We revisit this logic in a dynamic model in which shocks to labor income are correlated with the stock market, and in which Social Security replaces a higher share of income for lower-income individuals. In line with empirical evidence, lower-income individuals in the model experience a higher degree of correlation between labor earnings growth and stock returns. We find that utility-maximizing retirement portfolios can vary greatly across individuals, deviating substantially from the pattern of a target date fund for lower-income individuals.
34966.zh_abstract: 目标日期基金——最初将退休储蓄的很大一部分投资于股票，并在生命周期中逐渐转向债券——旨在为退休投资提供“一站式服务”。这种模式的原理在于，在工作者职业生涯初期最高的人力资本是“类债券”的。因此，当金融财富最初主要投资于股票，并且随着未来劳动收入现值的下降而转向债券时，效用达到最大化。我们在一个动态模型中重新审视这一逻辑，在该模型中，劳动收入的冲击与股票市场相关，并且社会保障为低收入个体替代了更高比例的收入。与经验证据一致，模型中的低收入个体经历了劳动收入增长与股票回报之间更高程度的相关性。我们发现，效用最大化的退休投资组合在不同个体之间可能存在巨大差异，对于低收入个体而言，会大幅偏离目标日期基金的模式。

34965.title: Out of the Black Box: Uncertainty Quantification for LLMs via Conditional Probabilities
34965.zh_title: 走出黑箱：基于条件概率的大语言模型不确定性量化
34965.authors: Hui Chen, Antoine Didisheim, Luciano A. Somoza
34965.abstract: Autoregressive LLMs generate text by sampling from estimated probability distributions over the next token, conditional on prior context. We use these probabilities to construct an entropy-based measure of prediction uncertainty, termed inner confidence.
