In news classification, LLM predictions with higher inner confidence are systematically more accurate. To evaluate the measure's economic relevance, we form long-short portfolios based on LLM predictions. The portfolio based on high-confidence predictions achieves a Sharpe ratio about 20\\% higher than the unconditional benchmark, while the one based on low-confidence predictions yields no excess returns. In contrast, self-declared confidence exhibits significant decoding biases and provides no comparable performance gains.
34965.zh_abstract: 自回归大语言模型通过从基于先前上下文条件估计的下一个词元概率分布中进行采样来生成文本。我们利用这些概率构建了一个基于熵的预测不确定性度量，称为内部置信度。在新闻分类中，具有更高内部置信度的大语言模型预测在系统上更为准确。为了评估该度量的经济相关性，我们基于大语言模型预测构建了多空投资组合。基于高置信度预测的投资组合实现了比无条件基准高出约20%的夏普比率，而基于低置信度预测的投资组合则未产生超额收益。相比之下，自我声明的置信度表现出显著的解码偏差，并且没有提供可比的绩效提升。

34964.title: Attention (And Money) Is All You Need: Why Universities Are Struggling to Keep AI Talent
34964.zh_title: 注意力（和金钱）就是一切：为什么大学难以留住人工智能人才
34964.authors: Ufuk Akcigit, Craig A. Chikis, Emin Dinlersoz, Nathan Goldschlag
34964.abstract: We construct a novel dataset linking academic publication records to U.S. Census employer–employee data to track 42,000 AI researchers over two decades. We document systematic changes in the allocation of AI talent. Industry increasingly attracts younger and foreign-born researchers, while gender representation improves more in academia. The top 1% of publishing industry scientists now earn $\$1.5$ million more annually than comparable academics, a fivefold increase since 2001. Rising wage premia coincide with greater sorting into large incumbent firms. Researchers who move to industry publish less but patent more, consistent with a shift from open science toward proprietary innovation.
34964.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个新颖的数据集，将学术发表记录与美国人口普查局的雇主-雇员数据相链接，以追踪42,000名人工智能研究人员长达二十年的动态。我们记录了人工智能人才配置的系统性变化。产业界日益吸引更年轻和外国出生的研究人员，而学术界在性别代表性方面改善更多。顶尖1%的产业界发表科学家的年收入现在比同类学术人员高出150万美元，自2001年以来增长了五倍。不断上升的工资溢价与向大型在位企业更大程度的分类效应同时发生。转向产业界的研究人员发表论文减少但专利增加，这与从开放科学向专有创新的转变相一致。
34964.meta: Programs：ED, EFG, LS, PR；JEL：I23, J45, L33, O31

34963.title: Work from Home and Fertility
34963.authors: Steven J. Davis, Cevat Giray Aksoy, Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Katelyn Cranney, Mathias Dolls, Pablo Zarate
34963.abstract: We investigate how fertility relates to work from home (WFH) in the post-pandemic era, drawing on original data from our Global Survey of Working Arrangements and U.S. Survey of Working Arrangements and Attitudes. Realized fertility from 2023 to 2025 and future planned fertility are higher among adults who WFH at least one day a week and, for couples, higher yet when both partners do so. Estimated lifetime fertility is greater by 0.32 children per woman when both partners WFH one or more days per week as compared to the case where neither does. The implications for national fertility rates differ across countries due mainly to large differences in WFH rates. In a complementary analysis using other U.S. data before and after the pandemic, one-year fertility rates rise with WFH opportunities in one's own occupation and, for couples, in the partner's occupation.
34963.zh_abstract: 我们利用来自我们的全球工作安排调查和美国工作安排与态度调查的原始数据，研究了在后疫情时代生育率与居家办公之间的关系。在每周至少居家办公一天的成年人中，以及对于伴侣双方都如此做的夫妇而言，2023年至2025年的已实现生育率和未来的计划生育率都更高。与双方都不居家办公的情况相比，当伴侣双方每周居家办公一天或以上时，估计的终身生育率每名女性高出0.32个孩子。对各国国家生育率的影响有所不同，这主要是由于居家办公率的巨大差异。在一项使用疫情前后其他美国数据的补充分析中，一年的生育率随着个人自身职业中的居家办公机会以及（对于夫妇而言）伴侣职业中的居家办公机会而上升。

34962.title: The Universal Pursuit of Safety and the Demand for (Lethal, Non-Lethal or No) Guns
34962.zh_title: 对安全的普遍追求与对（致命、非致命或没有）枪支的需求
34962.authors: Marcella Alsan, Joshua Schwartzstein, Stefanie Stantcheva
34962.abstract: Lethal firearm ownership is deeply polarizing in the United States. We show that beneath this polarization, owners and non-owners share a common objective — safety — but disagree sharply about whether lethal firearms achieve it. Using an original survey of more than 5,400 respondents combined with randomized experiments, we document that owners feel safe and confident with firearms, while non-owners on balance feel less safe around them and perceive large private costs and social harms. Demand for lethal firearms is nonetheless potentially large and growing: one-third of non-owners express interest in acquiring one — these individuals report the lowest day-to-day safety — while very few owners would consider reducing their holdings. Persuading owners to relinquish firearms without any replacement appears unrealistic; the more tractable margins may be safe storage and non-lethal substitution for additional purchases. We organize these patterns through a framework centered on a perceived safety possibilities frontier (SPF) — the safety outcomes a household believes achievable with different combinations of lethal and non-lethal tools. Households may differ in firearm demand because they face different risk environments, weigh protective benefits against harms differently, or hold different beliefs about the frontier. Our descriptive evidence points to heterogeneous beliefs as important drivers, suggesting that levers such as information could shift the perceived frontier. These patterns motivate three experimental treatments: one on the private legal/medical costs of lethal firearm ownership, and two on a non-lethal firearm (NLFA), with and without a conservative pundit’s endorsement. The private-cost treatment increases concern about harms among all respondents and support for safe storage policies, and modestly raises stated willingness to keep lethal firearms locked. NLFA treatments raise willingness to pay for an NLFA, to keep lethal firearms locked, and support for incapacitating over lethal firearms and for policies encouraging NLFAs. These effects are largely persistent. Importantly, NLFA information does not increase willingness to reduce lethal firearm ownership but does increase willingness to store lethal firearms safely. Our results suggest that many owners perceive the SPF differently from nonowners, neglecting harms or less-lethal alternatives, yet remain open to such tools. Overall, individuals share a common goal — safety — yet disagree about the means. Although these disagreements appear entrenched, people remain receptive to alternatives that might command broader agreement.
34962.zh_abstract: 致命枪支拥有权在美国是深度两极分化的。我们表明，在这种两极分化之下，拥有者和非拥有者共享一个共同目标——安全——但在致命枪支能否实现这一目标上存在严重分歧。利用一项包含5,400多名受访者的原始调查并结合随机实验，我们记录了拥有者使用枪支感到安全自信，而非拥有者总体上感觉不太安全，并感知到巨大的私人成本和社会危害。然而，对致命枪支的需求可能很大且在增长：三分之一的非拥有者表示有兴趣获得一支——这些人报告了最低的日常安全感——而很少有拥有者会考虑减少其持有量。说服拥有者放弃枪支而不提供任何替代品似乎不现实；更易处理的边际可能是安全储存和为额外购买提供非致命替代品。我们通过一个以感知安全可能性边界（SPF）为中心的框架来组织这些模式——该边界描述了一个家庭认为通过不同致命和非致命工具组合可以实现的安全结果。家庭可能因面临不同的风险环境、对保护性收益与危害的权衡不同，或对该边界持有不同信念，而在枪支需求上存在差异。我们的描述性证据指出，异质性信念是重要的驱动因素，表明信息等杠杆可能改变感知的边界。这些模式激发了三个实验处理：一个关于致命枪支拥有的私人法律/医疗成本，两个关于非致命枪支（NLFA），分别有和没有一位保守派权威人士的背书。私人成本处理增加了所有受访者对危害的担忧和对安全储存政策的支持，并适度提高了将致命枪支锁起来的陈述意愿。非致命枪支处理提高了对非致命枪支的支付意愿、将致命枪支锁起来的意愿、对非致命性而非致命性枪支的支持，以及对鼓励非致命枪支政策的支持。这些效应在很大程度上是持久的。重要的是，非致命枪支信息并未增加减少致命枪支拥有的意愿，但确实增加了安全储存致命枪支的意愿。我们的结果表明，许多拥有者与非拥有者对安全可能性边界的感知不同，忽视了危害或非致命替代方案，但仍然对这些工具持开放态度。总体而言，个体共享一个共同目标——安全——但对实现手段存在分歧。尽管这些分歧看似根深蒂固，但人们仍然愿意接受可能获得更广泛共识的替代方案。
34962.meta: Programs：CH, EH, PE, POL；JEL：H0, H80, I1, K0

34961.title: Cutting Costs or Cutting Corners: Asset Reallocation in Oil and Gas Production
34961.zh_title: 削减成本还是偷工减料：油气生产中的资产重新配置
34961.authors: Sarah C. Armitage, Judson Boomhower, Catherine Hausman
34961.abstract: Reallocation of assets across firms can lead to efficiency gains, but it can also lead to distortions via rent-seeking. We examine the link between asset reallocation and rent-seeking enabled by differences in the expected cost of environmental liabilities. Focusing on the US oil and gas industry, we develop a conceptual framework that incorporates both firm specialization in well types and the judgment-proof problem, by which undercapitalized firms can avoid environmental liabilities. We then build a novel dataset with hundreds of thousands of well transfers over 1992 to 2023, showing that oil and gas wells are transferred frequently, particularly as they age and their revenues decline. Moreover, low-value wells are especially likely to be transferred to low-value firms. Transferred wells produce similar amounts in later years, but are less likely to be plugged – thus posing greater environmental risk. We conclude with policy implications related to well plugging, bonding requirements, and decarbonization.
34961.zh_abstract: 资产在企业间的重新配置可以带来效率提升，但也可能通过寻租导致扭曲。我们研究了资产重新配置与由环境负债预期成本差异所促成的寻租之间的联系。聚焦于美国石油和天然气行业，我们构建了一个概念框架，该框架同时包含了企业在油井类型上的专业化以及“判决难题”——即资本不足的企业可以逃避环境责任。随后，我们构建了一个包含1992年至2023年间数十万次油井转让的新颖数据集，表明油气井被频繁转让，尤其是在它们老化且收入下降时。此外，低价值油井尤其可能被转让给低价值企业。被转让的油井在后续年份产量相似，但被堵塞的可能性更低——因此构成了更大的环境风险。最后，我们得出了与油井堵塞、保证金要求和脱碳相关的政策启示。
34961.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, LE；JEL：G33, G34, L25, L71, Q35, Q58

34960.title: max EPS Payout Policy
34960.zh_title: 最大化每股收益的股利政策
34960.abstract: Holding cash has a cost. For an EPS-maximizing CEO, that cost equals her firm’s earnings yield. EPS maximizers retain cash when they can get an even higher yield by investing the money. Otherwise, they return cash to shareholders. This is the EPS-maximizing payout policy. Growth stocks (EY < rf) never return cash because they can clear their low earnings-yield hurdle by investing in risk-free bonds. Value stocks (EY > rf) face a higher hurdle, which makes cash their cheapest source of capital but also raises the opportunity cost of retention. Value stocks return cash when they cannot invest in enough high-yield projects to make up for the higher cost. Paradoxically, the firms that are most likely to distribute cash—deep value stocks (EY ≫ rf)—are also the ones for whom internal cash is cheapest relative to external financing. Dividends and buybacks both deliver the same value to shareholders, but only buybacks can be accretive. Hence, EPS-maximizing CEOs prefer to distribute via buybacks. Some firms pay dividends for reasons outside our model. Such departures should concentrate among marginal value stocks (EY ≈ rf + ε) where the accretive pull of buybacks is weakest. Empirically, this logic explains which firms return cash, how they distribute the money, and time-series trends.
34960.zh_abstract: 持有现金是有成本的。对于一个追求每股收益最大化的CEO而言，该成本等于其公司的盈利收益率。追求每股收益最大化的CEO会在通过投资能获得更高收益率时保留现金。否则，他们会将现金返还给股东。这就是最大化每股收益的股利政策。成长型股票（盈利收益率 < 无风险利率）从不返还现金，因为它们可以通过投资于无风险债券来跨越其较低的盈利收益率门槛。价值型股票（盈利收益率 > 无风险利率）面临更高的门槛，这使得现金成为其最廉价的资本来源，但也提高了留存现金的机会成本。当价值型股票无法投资于足够多的高收益项目以弥补更高成本时，它们会返还现金。矛盾的是，最有可能分配现金的公司——深度价值型股票（盈利收益率 >> 无风险利率）——恰恰也是那些内部现金相对于外部融资最便宜的公司。股息和股票回购都为股东带来相同的价值，但只有股票回购能提升每股收益。因此，追求每股收益最大化的CEO更倾向于通过回购进行分配。一些公司出于我们模型之外的原因支付股息。这种偏离应集中在边际价值型股票（盈利收益率 ≈ 无风险利率 + ε）中，因为在这些股票中，回购对每股收益的提升作用最弱。从实证角度看，这一逻辑解释了哪些公司返还现金、它们如何分配资金以及时间序列趋势。
34960.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：G12, G31, G32, G35, M41

34959.title: Blockchain Technology for Traditional Finance
34959.zh_title: 面向传统金融的区块链技术
34959.abstract: Blockchain technology as embodied in cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum is comprised of both (a) a novel data structure and (b) a novel trust model. This paper analyzes the potential gains for traditional finance from an idealized version of the novel data structure on its own, with trust instead anchored in traditional sources such as rule of law, reputations, relationships, and collateral. Our framework has two parts. First, we analyze potential improvements for financial transactions that are already taking place. We identify three categories of improvement: (i) reducing real resource costs, (ii) improving balance sheet efficiency, and (iii) reducing intermediation rents. While the value of such improvements is hard to quantify precisely, we estimate that potential gains could be significant, especially the reduction in rents. Second, we analyze the potential for the technology to facilitate new transactions. We identify three channels: (i) making it more technologically difficult to cheat, (ii) making it easier to punish a cheating counterparty in a static sense, and (iii) making it easier to punish a cheating counterparty in a dynamic sense. Our key insight is that the potential gains are large if and only if there is a long tail of relatively low surplus, relatively infrequent transactions for which traditional forms of trust are insufficient. Last, we apply our framework to stablecoins. We conclude that if there are large gains from stablecoins for legal actors they are most likely to come from stablecoins putting pressure on intermediation rents or inefficient regulation, or from the programmability of stablecoins facilitating a large number of small transactions that otherwise would not have been trustworthy.
34959.zh_abstract: 以比特币和以太坊等加密货币为代表的区块链技术，同时包含（a）一种新颖的数据结构和（b）一种新颖的信任模型。本文分析了在信任仍锚定于法治、声誉、关系和抵押品等传统来源的情况下，仅采用理想化的新颖数据结构本身能为传统金融带来的潜在收益。我们的框架包含两个部分。首先，我们分析了对于已经发生的金融交易可能带来的改进。我们识别出三类改进：（i）降低实际资源成本，（ii）改善资产负债表效率，以及（iii）减少中介租金。虽然这些改进的价值难以精确量化，但我们估计潜在收益可能相当可观，尤其是租金的减少。其次，我们分析了该技术促进新交易的潜力。我们识别出三个渠道：（i）在技术上使欺诈更加困难，（ii）在静态意义上更容易惩罚欺诈的交易对手方，以及（iii）在动态意义上更容易惩罚欺诈的交易对手方。我们的关键见解是，当且仅当存在一个长尾的、相对低盈余、相对不频繁的、传统信任形式不足以支撑的交易时，潜在收益才是巨大的。最后，我们将我们的框架应用于稳定币。我们得出结论，如果稳定币能为合法参与者带来巨大收益，那么这些收益最有可能来自稳定币对中介租金或低效监管施加的压力，或者来自稳定币的可编程性促进了大量原本因缺乏信任而无法进行的小额交易。
34959.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO, ME；JEL：D47, E42, E5, G1, G2

34958.title: The Emergence of Regional Cultures in the United States
34958.abstract: This paper recovers the cultural geography of the United States from first-name patterns in census data spanning 1850 to 1930. Using unsupervised clustering of county-level name distributions, we identify spatially coherent cultural regions that align with historically recognized settlement patterns and remain stable across eight decades of economic and institutional change. The deepest division separates North from South, but finer groupings (New England, the Mid-Atlantic, Appalachia, the Deep South) emerge as nested subregions. Formal tests confirm that the recovered clusters are spatially contiguous, temporally persistent, and robust to resampling. The findings bear on whether liberal institutions require cultural homogeneity, whether cultural pluralism is a source of resilience or fragility, and how the imprint of early settlement shapes the practice of self-governance.
34958.zh_abstract: 本文利用1850年至1930年人口普查数据中的名字模式，复原了美国的文化地理。通过对县级名字分布进行无监督聚类，我们识别出空间上连贯的文化区域，这些区域与历史上公认的定居模式相符，并且在跨越八十年经济与制度变迁的时期内保持稳定。最深的划分将北方与南方分开，但更精细的分组（新英格兰、中大西洋地区、阿巴拉契亚地区、深南部）作为嵌套的子区域出现。正式检验证实，所恢复的聚类在空间上是连续的，在时间上是持久的，并且对重抽样具有稳健性。这些发现关系到：自由制度是否需要文化同质性；文化多元主义是韧性的来源还是脆弱的根源；以及早期定居的印记如何塑造自治实践。

34957.title: School Choice and Segregation: Evidence from the Oakland Unified School District
34957.zh_title: 学校选择与隔离：来自奥克兰联合学区的证据
34957.authors: Jesse Rothstein, Ini Umosen, Christopher R. Walters
34957.abstract: We study the prospects for changes in school priorities to reduce income segregation in a context of centralized school assignment, accounting for behavioral responses to school offers. Promoting integration is a central objective for large urban school districts in the US, and reforms to school assignment priorities are a prominent means of pursuing this goal. Such efforts may be constrained by students' decisions to exit the public school system in response to less-preferred school offers. Using data on kindergarten applicants to the Oakland Unified School District (OUSD), we show that offers of spots at first-choice schools boost the likelihood that applicants remain in OUSD. Nevertheless, simulations show that policy reforms giving priority for low-income students at high-income schools can substantially reduce segregation with minimal impacts on retention in the district.
34957.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在集中式学校分配的背景下，改变学校优先权以减少收入隔离的前景，并考虑了学生对学校录取通知的行为反应。促进融合是美国大型城市学区的一个核心目标，而改革学校分配优先权是实现这一目标的重要手段。然而，此类努力可能会受到学生因收到不太喜欢的学校录取通知而选择退出公立学校系统的限制。利用奥克兰联合学区（OUSD）幼儿园申请者的数据，我们表明，获得第一志愿学校的录取通知会增加申请者留在OUSD的可能性。尽管如此，模拟显示，给予低收入学生在高收入学校优先权的政策改革，可以在对学区保留率影响最小的情况下，大幅减少隔离。

34956.title: International Comparison of Physician Incomes
34956.authors: Aidan Buehler, Joshua D. Gottlieb, Jeffrey Hicks, Lisa Laun, Mårten Palme, Maria Polyakova, Victoria Udalova, Maria Ventura
34956.abstract: We compare physician incomes using tax data from the United States, Canada, Sweden, and the Netherlands. Physicians are concentrated in the top percentiles of the income distribution in all four countries, especially in the United States and certain specialties. Physician incomes are highest in the United States, and a decomposition shows that this mainly reflects differences in overall income distributions, rather than physicians’ locations in those distributions. This suggests that broader labor market differences, and thus physicians’ outside options, drive absolute incomes. Shifting US physicians’ incomes to match relative positions in other countries’ distributions would only marginally reduce healthcare spending.
34956.zh_abstract: 我们使用来自美国、加拿大、瑞典和荷兰的税收数据比较医生收入。在所有四个国家，医生都集中在收入分布的顶端百分位数，尤其是在美国和某些专业领域。美国的医生收入最高，一项分解表明，这主要反映了整体收入分布的差异，而非医生在这些分布中所处位置的差异。这表明，更广泛的劳动力市场差异，以及由此产生的医生的外部选择，决定了绝对收入水平。将美国医生的收入调整为与其他国家分布中相对位置相匹配的水平，只会略微减少医疗支出。
34956.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE；JEL：I13, I18, J24, J31

34955.title: Physician Competition: Entry and Substitution
34955.abstract: We describe competition in the physician market, focusing on how entry barriers and substitution possibilities have changed in recent decades. Regulatory caps on medical school seats and residency slots—especially for high-paying specialties—continue to ration entry, generate high returns for those who gain these slots, and direct the most academically accomplished trainees toward lucrative fields. But trained physicians increasingly compete with nurse practitioners, physician assistants, and other mid-level practitioners in the market for patients. Training of these substitutes has expanded far more rapidly than physician supply. We present key facts about the physician pipeline, a conceptual framework linking specialty earnings to entry barriers, and describe the rise of mid-level providers. These facts mean that effective competition policy in physician markets must look beyond conventional concentration measures and focus on the institutions and laws that govern who can provide medical care.
34955.zh_abstract: 我们描述了医生市场的竞争，重点关注近几十年来进入壁垒和替代可能性的变化。对医学院名额和住院医师职位（尤其是高薪专业）的监管上限，持续限制着进入，为获得这些职位的人带来高回报，并将学业成就最高的受训者引向利润丰厚的领域。但是，受过培训的医生在患者市场上越来越多地与执业护士、医师助理和其他中级从业人员竞争。这些替代者的培训增长速度远快于医生的供给。我们介绍了关于医生培养管道的关键事实，一个将专业收入与进入壁垒联系起来的框架，并描述了中级医疗服务提供者的崛起。这些事实意味着，有效的医生市场竞争政策必须超越传统的集中度衡量指标，并聚焦于决定谁可以提供医疗服务的机构和法律。
34955.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE；JEL：I11, J44, L13, L50

34954.title: Stimulating Auto Markets
34954.authors: David W. Berger, Geoffrey Gee, Nick Turner, Eric Zwick
34954.abstract: How does fiscal stimulus affect durable goods sales and to what extent does stimulus drive inflation? We study this question in the context of how the unprecedented pandemic fiscal stimulus affected household car purchases and auto prices. Using administrative data on vehicle registrations, we exploit the timing of nearly $\$900$ billion in stimulus payments and geographic differences in program exposure to identify causal effects on sales. We find the stimulus increased purchases by 5.5 million vehicles (3.2%) during 2020–2022, implying a medium-run (3-year) marginal propensity to spend (MPX) on autos of 0.19 and a total marginal propensity to consume (MPC) of 0.47. Despite this substantial demand response, fiscal transfers account for less than 20% of the surge in auto prices. In a general equilibrium model with new and used markets, we show how secondary-market interactions dampen inflation. When transfers push households onto the new-car margin, trade-ins expand used supply and limit price increases. This channel weakens when supply is tight or when policy targets borrowing constraints, in which case stimulus manifests more as inflation than output. Non-fiscal factors, including supply constraints, relaxed credit conditions, and preference shifts, explain the majority of the observed inflation.
34954.zh_abstract: 财政刺激如何影响耐用品销售？刺激在多大程度上推动通胀？我们在大流行期间前所未有的财政刺激如何影响家庭购车和汽车价格的背景下研究这一问题。利用车辆登记的行政数据，我们利用近9000亿美元刺激款项的发放时机以及项目暴露程度的地理差异来识别对销售的因果效应。我们发现，刺激措施在2020-2022年间增加了550万辆（3.2%）的购买量，这意味着汽车的中期（3年）边际支出倾向（MPX）为0.19，总边际消费倾向（MPC）为0.47。尽管需求反应如此显著，但财政转移支付仅占汽车价格飙升的不到20%。在一个包含新车和二手车市场的一般均衡模型中，我们展示了二手车市场的互动如何抑制通胀。当转移支付将家庭推向新车购买决策时，以旧换新增加了二手车的供给，从而限制了价格上涨。当供应紧张或政策针对借贷约束时，这一渠道会减弱，此时刺激措施更多地表现为通胀而非产出增长。非财政因素，包括供应限制、信贷条件放宽和偏好转变，解释了所观察到的大部分通胀。
34954.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, ME, PE；JEL：D12, E21, E31, E32, E62, H12, H24, H31, H53, L62

34953.title: AI in Science
34953.authors: Ajay K. Agrawal, John McHale, Alexander Oettl
34953.abstract: We explore the impact of artificial intelligence (AI) on the knowledge production function. We characterize AI as a tool, not for full automation but rather for augmentation through enhanced search over combinatorial spaces. This leads to increased scientific productivity. We decompose knowledge production into a multi-stage process to shed light on the "jagged frontier" of AI in science, revealing differential returns to different tools across domains (e.g., data-rich biology vs. anomaly-sparse physics) and workflow stages (e.g., strong design aids like AlphaFold vs. subtler question generation tools). We treat human judgment as indispensable for tasks involving abductive inference, contextual nuance, and trade-offs, particularly in data-sparse environments. Drawing on a task-based model that distinguishes "ordinary" from AI-expert scientists, we describe how exogenous improvements in AI yield nonlinear productivity gains amplified by the share of scientists that are AI-experts to underscore the role of AI complements like skills training and organizational design.
34953.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了人工智能（AI）对知识生产函数的影响。我们将AI描述为一种工具，不是用于完全自动化，而是通过增强对组合空间的搜索来进行增强。这导致了科学生产力的提高。我们将知识生产分解为一个多阶段过程，以揭示AI在科学中的“锯齿状前沿”，揭示了不同工具在不同领域（例如，数据丰富的生物学与异常稀疏的物理学）和工作流程阶段（例如，像AlphaFold这样的强大设计辅助工具与更微妙的提问生成工具）的差异化回报。我们认为，在涉及溯因推理、情境细微差别和权衡取舍的任务中，尤其是在数据稀疏的环境中，人类判断是不可或缺的。基于一个区分“普通”科学家和AI专家科学家的任务模型，我们描述了外生的AI改进如何产生非线性的生产力增长，这种增长被AI专家科学家所占的比例放大，从而强调了AI互补品（如技能培训和组织设计）的作用。

34952.title: Easy A’s, Less Pay: The Long-Term Effects of Grade Inflation
34952.zh_title: 轻松得A，收入更低：成绩膨胀的长期影响
34952.authors: Jeffrey T. Denning, Rachel L. Nesbit, Nolan G. Pope, Merrill Warnick
34952.abstract: Average grades continue to rise in the United States, raising the question of how grade inflation impacts students. We provide comprehensive evidence on how teacher grading practices affect students' long-run success. Using administrative high school data from Los Angeles and from Maryland that is linked to postsecondary and earnings records, we develop and validate two teacher-level measures of grade inflation: one measuring average grade inflation and another measuring a teacher's propensity to give a passing grade. These measures of grade inflation are distinct from teacher value-added, with grade inflating teachers having moderately lower cognitive value-added and slightly higher noncognitive value-added. These two measures also differentially impact students' long-term outcomes. Being assigned a higher average grade inflating teacher reduces a student's future test scores, the likelihood of graduating from high school, college enrollment, and ultimately earnings. In contrast, passing grade inflation reduces the likelihood of being held back and increases high school graduation, with limited long-run effects. The cumulative impact is economically significant: a teacher with one standard deviation higher average grade inflation reduces the present discounted value of lifetime earnings of their students by $\$213,872$ per year.
34952.zh_abstract: 美国的平均成绩持续上升，这引发了成绩膨胀如何影响学生的问题。我们提供了关于教师评分实践如何影响学生长期成功的全面证据。利用来自洛杉矶和马里兰州的高中行政数据，这些数据与高等教育和收入记录相关联，我们开发并验证了两个教师层面的成绩膨胀衡量指标：一个衡量平均成绩膨胀，另一个衡量教师给予及格成绩的倾向。这些成绩膨胀指标与教师增值效应不同，成绩膨胀型教师的认知增值效应中等偏低，而非认知增值效应略高。这两个指标对学生长期结果的影响也不同。被分配给平均成绩膨胀程度更高的教师，会降低学生未来的考试成绩、高中毕业的可能性、大学入学率以及最终的收入。相比之下，及格成绩膨胀降低了留级的可能性，提高了高中毕业率，但长期影响有限。累积影响在经济上意义重大：平均成绩膨胀程度高出一个标准差的教师，会使其学生终身收入的现值每年减少213,872美元。

34951.title: Targeting, Personalization, and Engagement in an Agricultural Advisory Service
34951.zh_title: 农业咨询服务中的目标定位、个性化与参与度
34951.authors: Susan Athey, Shawn Cole, Shanjukta Nath, Jessica Zhu
34951.abstract: We conduct a series of iterative experiments to evaluate approaches for optimally targeting calls for an agricultural advisory service serving over one million farmers in rural India. We estimate the value of alternative targeted policies using “off-policy” evaluation on data from randomized call assignments. When we evaluate off-policy using held-out data from the same time periods used to design the targeted policies, we find that targeted policies increase engagement by up to 8%. However, when we design a policy using current data and then implement the policy for randomly selected users in subsequent weeks, our “on-policy” evaluation estimates show realized gains that are substantially smaller. We develop tools to diagnose the causes of this underperformance and adopt a transfer-learning approach to policy learning and off-policy evaluation that accounts for temporal changes in farmer behavior, substantially improving off-policy estimates of performance in subsequent weeks. We further develop novel approaches to targeted policy design that respond to organizational objectives and resource constraints, including distributional goals (e.g., reaching women farmers) and prioritizing farmers likely to benefit most from the information on downstream outcomes (e.g., yields). We propose a method for organizations to quantify trade-offs between objectives, and we demonstrate the value of targeting for alleviating these trade-offs.
34951.zh_abstract: 我们进行了一系列迭代实验，以评估为一项服务于印度农村超过一百万农民的农业咨询服务优化电话呼叫目标定位的方法。我们利用随机呼叫分配的数据，通过“离策略”评估来估计替代性目标定位策略的价值。当我们使用与设计目标定位策略相同时间段内的保留数据进行离策略评估时，我们发现目标定位策略最多可将参与度提高8%。然而，当我们使用当前数据设计一项策略，然后在随后几周内对随机选择的用户实施该策略时，我们的“在策略”评估估计显示，实际收益要小得多。我们开发了诊断这种表现不佳原因的工具，并采用了一种迁移学习方法进行策略学习和离策略评估，该方法考虑了农民行为的时序变化，从而显著改进了对后续几周表现的离策略估计。我们进一步开发了新颖的目标定位策略设计方法，以响应组织目标和资源约束，包括分配目标（例如，覆盖女性农民）以及优先考虑那些最有可能从下游结果（例如，产量）信息中受益的农民。我们提出了一种方法，供组织量化不同目标之间的权衡，并展示了目标定位在缓解这些权衡方面的价值。

34950.title: The Economics of Algorithmic Personalization: Evidence from an Educational Technology Platform
34950.zh_title: 算法个性化推荐的经济学：来自教育科技平台的证据
34950.authors: Keshav Agrawal, Susan Athey, Ayush Kanodia, Shanjukta Nath, Emil Palikot
34950.abstract: Can personalized recommendations improve engagement in educational technology? We design, test, and scale a collaborative filtering system for Freadom, an English-learning app for Indian children. A randomized controlled trial (RCT) with 7,750 students shows that personalization, deployed in a single content section, increases engagement by 60% in that section and by 14% app-wide. We then exploit an eligibility threshold in a regression discontinuity design (RDD) to track effects over five months of deployment. For user cohorts receiving personalization during deployment, RDD estimates exceed RCT benchmark by a factor of 2.5, opposite of the “voltage drop" typically observed in policy scale-ups. This provides evidence that, for algorithmic interventions, RCT estimates may be lower bounds on scaled impact rather than upper bounds. However, personalization benefits are front-loaded. Gains concentrate in users’ first weeks, with diminishing returns thereafter. This pattern, combined with the sharp decline in predicted match quality as users exhaust their best content matches, suggests that content availability rather than algorithmic sophistication becomes the binding constraint.
34950.zh_abstract: 个性化推荐能否提高教育科技的参与度？我们为Freadom（一款面向印度儿童的英语学习应用）设计、测试并扩展了一个协同过滤系统。一项包含7,750名学生的随机对照试验表明，在单个内容板块部署个性化推荐，使该板块的参与度提高了60%，整个应用的参与度提高了14%。然后，我们利用断点回归设计中的一个资格阈值，来追踪部署期间超过五个月的效果。对于在部署期间接受个性化推荐的用户群组，断点回归设计的估计值比随机对照试验基准高出2.5倍，这与政策推广中通常观察到的“电压降”现象相反。这提供了证据表明，对于算法干预而言，随机对照试验的估计值可能是规模化影响的低界而非高界。然而，个性化推荐的好处是前期集中的。收益集中在用户使用的头几周，之后边际收益递减。这种模式，加上随着用户耗尽最佳内容匹配而导致的预测匹配质量急剧下降，表明内容可用性而非算法复杂性成为了约束条件。
34950.meta: Programs：ED, IO；JEL：C21, C93, I21, L81, M30

34949.title: Medicaid Coverage for Obesity Medications: Utilization and Net-of-Rebate Spending
34949.zh_title: 肥胖药物的医疗补助覆盖：使用与净回扣支出
34949.authors: Coady Wing, Wei-Lun Lo, Maddie Potter, Tarik Yuce, Alberto Ortega, John Cawley, Thuy D. Nguyen, Kosali I. Simon
34949.abstract: We document state variation in Medicaid coverage for obesity-indicated GLP-1 medications over time, and use a stacked difference-in-differences design to estimate the effects of coverage on utilization and net-of-rebate spending. Nine quarters out, coverage increases prescriptions for obesity-indicated GLP-1 medications by 0.82 per 100 enrollee-months (SE = 0.10). Coverage had no effect on GLP-1 prescribing for diabetes or cardiovascular indications, suggesting that off-label prescribing of diabetes formulations for obesity is not very common in the Medicaid program. The expansions do not appear to affect consumer spending at major online GLP-1 compounding firms, which suggests that the utilization response in our main analysis reflects new utilization rather than crowd-out. We find that coverage increases net-of-rebate Medicaid spending by $\$751.6$ per 100 enrollee-months (SE = $\$92.0$), compared to $\$986.9$ in gross reimbursements—manufacturer rebates reduce the state’s net spending by approximately 24 percent. Across the 17 states that ever covered obesity-indicated GLP-1 medications by mid 2025, coverage increased Medicaid net spending by around $\$2.68$ billion per year. Extending Medicaid coverage in the remaining states would generate a further $\$3.63$ billion in annual net spending.
34949.zh_abstract: 我们记录了各州医疗补助计划对用于肥胖适应症的GLP-1药物覆盖范围随时间的变化，并使用堆叠双重差分设计来估计覆盖范围对使用量和净回扣支出的影响。九个季度后，覆盖范围使每100个参保人-月中用于肥胖适应症的GLP-1药物处方增加了0.82份（标准误=0.10）。覆盖范围对用于糖尿病或心血管适应症的GLP-1处方没有影响，这表明在医疗补助计划中，将糖尿病制剂超说明书用于肥胖的情况并不常见。这些扩展似乎没有影响主要在线GLP-1复方制药公司的消费者支出，这表明我们主要分析中的使用量反应反映了新的使用量而非挤出效应。我们发现，覆盖范围使每100个参保人-月的净回扣医疗补助支出增加了751.6美元（标准误=92.0美元），而总报销额为986.9美元——制造商回扣使州的净支出减少了约24%。在截至2025年中期曾覆盖用于肥胖适应症的GLP-1药物的17个州中，覆盖范围使医疗补助净支出每年增加约26.8亿美元。在其余州扩大医疗补助覆盖范围将每年再产生36.3亿美元的净支出。
34949.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, PE；JEL：I11, I13, I18

34948.title: We've Got You Covered: Firms' Political Stances on Abortion and Labor Market Sorting
34948.zh_title: 我们为你兜底：企业在堕胎问题上的政治立场与劳动力市场分类
34948.authors: Pawel Adrjan, Svenja Gudell, Emily E. Nix, Allison Shrivastava, Jason Sockin, Evan P. Starr
34948.abstract: Amidst rising political polarization, firms engage more frequently with political issues through public statements and policies. This paper examines how firms' stances on polarizing issues impact worker sorting, leveraging announcements from hundreds of employers following the Supreme Court's ruling in Dobbs v. Jackson, overturning federal abortion rights. We introduce a methodology to uncover labor market competitors for each announcing firm based on job seekers' revealed preferences. While announcing firms received more applications from job seekers, particularly in Democratic-leaning states and female-dominated jobs where abortion was outlawed, current employees began searching for jobs elsewhere as employee satisfaction declined, particularly among male-dominated jobs. Smaller companies with less-established reputations experienced the largest effects. When deciding whether to take a sociopolitical stance, firms face a complicated trade-off: attracting culturally-aligned workers at the expense of alienating current ones.
34948.zh_abstract: 在政治两极分化日益加剧的背景下，企业通过公开声明和政策更频繁地介入政治议题。本文研究了企业在两极分化问题上的立场如何影响工人分类，利用了数百家雇主在最高法院对多布斯诉杰克逊妇女健康组织案作出裁决（推翻联邦堕胎权）后发布的公告。我们引入了一种方法，基于求职者的显示性偏好来揭示每个公告企业的劳动力市场竞争者。虽然公告企业收到了更多求职者的申请，尤其是在堕胎被定为非法的民主党倾向州和女性主导的工作岗位，但现有员工开始在其他地方寻找工作，因为员工满意度下降，尤其是在男性主导的工作岗位。声誉较不稳固的小公司受到的影响最大。在决定是否采取社会政治立场时，企业面临着一个复杂的权衡：吸引文化上一致的工人，代价是疏远现有员工。

34947.title: Deep Learning Projects Jurisdiction of New and Proposed Clean Water Act Regulation
34947.zh_title: 深度学习预测新拟议《清洁水法》法规的管辖范围
34947.authors: Simon Greenhill, Brant J. Walker, Joseph S. Shapiro
34947.abstract: Projecting the effects of proposed policy reforms is challenging because no outcome data exist for regulations that governments have not yet implemented. We propose an ex ante deep learning framework that can project effects of proposed reforms by mapping outcomes observed under past regulations onto the legal criteria of proposed future policies (i.e., by “relabeling”). We apply this framework to study changes in jurisdiction of the US Clean Water Act (CWA). We compare our ex ante deep learning projection of jurisdiction under the Supreme Court’s Sackett decision against widely used projections from domain experts. Ex ante machine learning generates exceptional performance improvements over the leading domain expert model that the US Environmental Protection Agency currently uses, with 65 times more accurate identification of jurisdictional sites. We also develop an ex post deep learning model trained with data after policy implementation. Ex post deep learning performs best. Sackett deregulates one-third of all previously regulated US waters, particularly floodplains and pristine fish habitats, totaling 700,000 deregulated stream miles and 17 million deregulated wetland acres. Deep learning can effectively project consequences of far-reaching regulatory reforms before they are implemented, when projections are both most uncertain and most useful.
34947.zh_abstract: 预测拟议政策改革的效果具有挑战性，因为对于政府尚未实施的法规，不存在结果数据。我们提出了一个事前深度学习框架，该框架可以通过将过去法规下观察到的结果映射到拟议未来政策的法律标准上（即通过“重新标记”），来预测拟议改革的效果。我们将此框架应用于研究美国《清洁水法》管辖范围的变化。我们将我们的事前深度学习预测（针对最高法院Sackett案判决后的管辖范围）与领域专家广泛使用的预测进行了比较。事前机器学习比美国环境保护署目前使用的领先领域专家模型产生了显著的性能提升，对管辖地点的识别准确率提高了65倍。我们还开发了一个事后深度学习模型，该模型使用政策实施后的数据进行训练。事后深度学习表现最佳。Sackett案判决解除了对所有先前受监管的美国水域中三分之一水域的监管，特别是洪泛区和原始鱼类栖息地，总计70,000英里的溪流和1,700万英亩的湿地被解除监管。深度学习可以在影响深远且最不确定但又最有用的监管改革实施之前，有效地预测其后果。
34947.meta: Programs：IO, LE, PE, POL；JEL：C45, D61, H11, H23, K32, Q25, Q53, Q58, R11

34991.title: Private Credit, Balance Sheets and Financial Stability
34991.zh_title: 私人信贷、资产负债表与金融稳定
34991.authors: Gregor Matvos, Tomasz Piskorski, Amit Seru
34991.abstract: We document new evidence on the capitalization, funding structure, and performance of private credit funds using comprehensive fund- and asset-level data covering most of the industry. Private credit funds are highly capitalized, with equity typically accounting for 65–80% of total assets—more than six times the capitalization of U.S. banks, where equity represents about 10%. Debt usage is moderate and largely reflects bank credit lines used for liquidity management. Fund lives average 10–12 years, while underlying loan maturities are generally shorter, implying little or no maturity mismatch—unlike banks, which fund long-term assets with short-term callable deposits. Private credit portfolios are diversified across industries, geographies, and credit strategies, reducing exposure to correlated shocks. Performance data show positive average net annualized returns with limited downside risk to creditors, as losses are largely borne by equity investors. Overall, private credit funds appear conservatively structured and unlikely to pose systemic risks comparable to traditional banks under their current balance-sheet configurations. We conclude by discussing potential vulnerabilities that could emerge as the sector grows, including governance and disclosure frictions, stress-period dynamics, bank–nonbank linkages, and the transmission of losses through limited partner balance sheets and retail investment vehicles.
34991.zh_abstract: 我们利用覆盖该行业大部分领域的综合性基金和资产层面数据，记录了关于私人信贷基金资本化、融资结构和业绩的新证据。私人信贷基金资本化程度很高，股权通常占总资产的65-80%——是美国银行资本化水平的六倍多，后者的股权约占10%。债务使用适度，且主要反映用于流动性管理的银行信贷额度。基金存续期平均为10-12年，而基础贷款期限通常更短，这意味着几乎没有或根本没有期限错配——这与银行不同，银行用短期可随时提取的存款为长期资产融资。私人信贷组合在行业、地域和信贷策略上实现了多元化，减少了对相关冲击的风险敞口。业绩数据显示，平均年化净回报率为正，且债权人的下行风险有限，因为损失主要由股权投资者承担。总体而言，私人信贷基金的结构似乎较为保守，在其当前的资产负债表配置下，不太可能产生与传统银行相当的系统性风险。最后，我们讨论了随着该行业增长可能出现的潜在脆弱性，包括治理和披露摩擦、压力时期动态、银行与非银行关联，以及通过有限合伙人资产负债表和零售投资工具传导的损失。

34990.title: The Effects of California's $20 Fast Food Minimum Wage on Prices
34990.zh_title: 加州20美元快餐最低工资对价格的影响
34990.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Olivia Edwards, Jonathan Meer, Joshua D. Nguyen
34990.abstract: We analyze the effect of California's $\$20$ fast food minimum wage (Assembly Bill 1228), enacted in September 2023 and implemented in April 2024, on consumer prices using the Bureau of Labor Statistics' Consumer Price Indices for food away from home across 21 metropolitan statistical areas. Food away from home prices in California's four in-sample MSAs increased by 3.3 to 3.6 percent relative to 17 control MSAs through December 2024. Our estimates are stable across a number of specifications. Placebo tests on price indices for goods and services that were not affected by the policy, including food at home, show no differential increases in California's MSAs. The price increases we estimate likely arise in part from spillovers to the full-service sector, as well as changes in the production functions and product quality choices of limited service restaurants.
34990.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国劳工统计局21个大都市统计区的在外就餐消费者价格指数，分析了加州20美元快餐最低工资（第1228号议会法案，于2023年9月颁布，2024年4月实施）对消费价格的影响。截至2024年12月，加州四个样本内MSA的在外就餐价格相对于17个控制组MSA上涨了3.3%至3.6%。我们的估计值在多种设定下保持稳定。对未受该政策影响的商品和服务（包括在家食品）价格指数进行的安慰剂检验显示，加州的MSA没有出现差异性的上涨。我们估计的价格上涨可能部分源于对全服务餐饮业的溢出效应，以及有限服务餐厅生产函数和产品质量选择的改变。

34989.title: The Precarious Financial Lives of College Students in Sub-Saharan Africa
34989.zh_title: 撒哈拉以南非洲大学生岌岌可危的财务状况
34989.authors: Natalie Bau, Corinne Low, Simona Simona, Bryce Steinberg
34989.abstract: Investment in tertiary education in Africa, unlike richer settings, is often portrayed as inequitable and inefficient. Yet, though Africa will produce much of the world’s future workforce, there is little information on college students’ financial constraints. Novel data from a Zambian flagship university show that students are highly financially vulnerable and food insecure, on par with the "ultra-poor.'' Because universities are typically urban, cash poor rural students struggle with high urban costs of living. Being allocated on-campus housing leads to less financial vulnerability and better academic outcomes. Financially supporting African university students could promote both equity and efficiency.
34989.zh_abstract: 与较富裕地区不同，非洲的高等教育投资常被认为既不公平又低效。然而，尽管非洲将贡献世界未来的大部分劳动力，但关于大学生财务约束的信息却很少。来自赞比亚一所旗舰大学的新数据显示，学生的财务脆弱性和粮食不安全程度非常高，与“极端贫困”人群相当。由于大学通常位于城市，现金匮乏的农村学生难以应对高昂的城市生活成本。被分配校内宿舍能降低财务脆弱性并带来更好的学业成果。为非洲大学生提供财务支持可能同时促进公平和效率。
34989.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, PE；JEL：I22, I24, I25, I30, O1, O12

34988.title: Lender of Last Resort and Local Economic Outcomes
34988.zh_title: 最后贷款人与地方经济结果
34988.abstract: This paper studies the long-run labor market consequences of lender-of-last-resort (LLR) intervention during the Great Depression. I exploit a natural experiment created by the Federal Reserve district border separating counties under the jurisdiction of the Atlanta and St. Louis Federal Reserve Banks. During the banking panic of 1930, the Atlanta Fed aggressively extended liquidity to distressed banks, while the St. Louis Fed largely refrained from intervention. Using newly digitized county-level manufacturing data and linked individual-level census records from 1930 and 1940, I examine how exposure to this liquidity support affected local economic activity and worker outcomes. Counties within the Atlanta district experienced fewer bank failures and stronger manufacturing performance in the early 1930s. These differences translated into persistent labor market effects: individuals in treated counties were more likely to remain in manufacturing employment and less likely to migrate across state lines by 1940. The results suggest that financial stabilization policies can shape the long-run allocation of labor across regions and sectors.
34988.zh_abstract: 本文研究了大萧条时期最后贷款人（LLR）干预对劳动力市场的长期后果。我利用联邦储备区边界创造的一个自然实验，该边界分隔了亚特兰大和圣路易斯联邦储备银行管辖下的县。在1930年的银行恐慌期间，亚特兰大联储积极向陷入困境的银行提供流动性，而圣路易斯联储则基本不进行干预。利用新数字化的县级制造业数据以及1930年和1940年关联的个人层面人口普查记录，我考察了这种流动性支持对地方经济活动和工人结果的影响。亚特兰大区内的县在1930年代初期经历了更少的银行倒闭和更强的制造业表现。这些差异转化为持续的劳动力市场效应：到1940年，受处理县的个人更有可能留在制造业就业，并且更不可能跨州迁移。结果表明，金融稳定政策可以塑造劳动力在区域和部门间的长期配置。

34987.title: Substitution and Income Effects of Labor Income Taxation
34987.zh_title: 劳动所得税的替代效应与收入效应
34987.authors: Michael Graber, Morten Håvarstein, Magne Mogstad, Gaute Torsvik, Ola L. Vestad
34987.abstract: The elasticity of taxable income (ETI) parameter is a key quantity in empirical analysis of tax policy and labor supply. We examine when a commonly applied class of ETI estimands can be used to learn about individuals’ ETI parameters and their (un)compensated elasticities of labor supply. We begin by providing necessary and sufficient conditions for these estimands to be given a causal interpretation as a positively weighted average of heterogeneous ETI parameters. We then apply these results to empirically analyze a reform of the Norwegian tax system that reduced the marginal tax rates on middle and high incomes. The estimated ETI parameters increase steadily with income, meaning high-income individuals are more responsive to tax changes than middle-income individuals. Next, we show how (un)compensated elasticities of labor supply can be bounded directly from the ETI estimands, or point identified by combining these estimands with estimates of earnings responses to lottery winnings. The results suggest an (un)compensated elasticity of 0.1 (0.0) for middle-income individuals. The (un)compensated elasticity estimates increase steadily with income to around 0.45 (0.3) for high-income individuals. These findings imply a substantial excess burden of taxation, and that reducing top-income tax rates would increase tax revenue. Our findings are also informative about how the intertemporal elasticity of substitution and the Frisch elasticity vary across the income distribution.
34987.zh_abstract: 应税收入弹性（ETI）参数是税收政策和劳动供给实证分析中的一个关键量。我们考察了何时可以使用一类常用的ETI估计量来了解个人的ETI参数及其（非）补偿劳动供给弹性。我们首先为这些估计量能够被解释为异质性ETI参数的正加权平均值提供了必要和充分条件。然后，我们将这些结果应用于实证分析挪威税制的一项改革，该改革降低了中等收入和高收入的边际税率。估计的ETI参数随收入稳步增加，这意味着高收入个体对税收变化的反应比中等收入个体更大。接下来，我们展示了如何直接从ETI估计量中界定（非）补偿劳动供给弹性，或者通过将这些估计量与对彩票中奖收入反应的估计相结合来点识别这些弹性。结果表明，中等收入个体的（非）补偿弹性为0.1（0.0）。对于高收入个体，（非）补偿弹性估计值稳步上升至约0.45（0.3）。这些发现意味着税收存在巨大的超额负担，并且降低高收入税率将增加税收收入。我们的发现也有助于了解跨期替代弹性和弗里希弹性如何随收入分布变化。

34986.title: What Makes New Work Different from More Work?
34986.zh_title: 是什么让新工作不同于更多的工作？
34986.authors: David Autor, Caroline Chin, Anna M. Salomons, Bryan Seegmiller
34986.abstract: We study the role of expertise in new work–novel occupational roles that emerge as technological and economic conditions evolve–using newly available 1940 and 1950 Census Complete Count files and confidential American Community Survey data from 2011-2023. We show that new work is systematically distinct from simply more work in existing occupations in four respects. First, it attracts workers with distinct characteristics: new work is disproportionately performed by younger and more educated workers, even within detailed occupation-industry cells. Second, new work commands economically significant wage premiums that persist beyond workers' initial entry into new work, consistent with returns to scarce, specialized expertise rather than temporary market disequilibrium. Third, these premiums decline across vintages as expertise diffuses, with 'newer' new work commanding larger premiums than older new work. Fourth, the emergence of new work can be traced to specific demand shocks in particular locations and time periods, suggesting that expertise formation responds systematically to economic opportunities. These findings suggest that new work serves as a countervailing force to automation-driven job displacement not merely by creating additional employment, but also by generating new domains of human expertise that command market premiums. This expertise-based mechanism helps explain both the expanding variety of work activities across decades and the historical resilience of the labor share.
34986.zh_abstract: 我们利用新近可获取的1940年和1950年人口普查完整计数文件以及2011-2023年保密的美国社区调查数据，研究了专业知识在新工作（即随着技术和经济条件演变而出现的新职业角色）中的作用。我们表明，新工作与现有职业中单纯更多的工作在四个方面存在系统性差异。第一，它吸引了具有独特特征的工人：即使在详细的职业-行业单元内，新工作也由更年轻、受教育程度更高的工人不成比例地承担。第二，新工作带来了经济上显著的工资溢价，并且这种溢价在工人最初进入新工作之后仍然持续存在，这与稀缺、专业化专业知识的回报一致，而非暂时的市场失衡。第三，随着专业知识的扩散，这些溢价在不同“代际”间下降，“更新”的新工作比“较旧”的新工作享有更大的溢价。第四，新工作的出现可以追溯到特定地点和时期的特定需求冲击，这表明专业知识的形成是对经济机会的系统性反应。这些发现表明，新工作作为自动化导致的工作岗位流失的抵消力量，不仅通过创造额外的就业机会，而且还通过产生新的、能获得市场溢价的人类专业知识领域来发挥作用。这种基于专业知识的机制有助于解释几十年来工作活动种类的不断扩展以及劳动份额在历史上的韧性。

34985.title: Contract Enforcement and Young Firm Capital Structure: A Global Perspective
34985.zh_title: 合同执行与年轻企业资本结构：全球视角
34985.authors: Gonzalo E. Basante Pereira, Ina Simonovska
34985.abstract: We develop a framework to measure the severity of financial constraints for young firms across countries. Using ORBIS balance-sheet data for 23 economies, we show that short-term leverage rises while long-term leverage falls early in firms’ life cycles, with this pattern persisting longer where contract enforcement is weaker. We build a model of optimal financing under limited enforcement with endogenous debt maturity and blueprint capacity that matches these patterns and enables structural measurement of financial constraints. The framework decomposes the funding gap into within-firm borrowing constraints that ease with repayment history and a scale distortion identifiable through cross-country comparisons.
34985.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个框架来衡量各国年轻企业面临的融资约束严重程度。利用23个经济体的ORBIS资产负债表数据，我们表明，在企业生命周期的早期，短期杠杆率上升而长期杠杆率下降，这种模式在合同执行较弱的国家持续更久。我们建立了一个在有限执行条件下的最优融资模型，该模型包含内生债务期限和蓝图产能，能够匹配这些模式，并实现对融资约束的结构性测量。该框架将资金缺口分解为企业内部随还款历史而缓解的借贷约束，以及可通过跨国比较识别的规模扭曲。
34985.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, EFG, IFM, ITI, PR；JEL：F34, G15, G3, G33, O43

34984.title: Artificial Intelligence, Productivity, and the Workforce: Evidence from Corporate Executives
34984.zh_title: 人工智能、生产力与劳动力：来自企业高管的证据
34984.authors: Salomé Baslandze, Zachary Edwards, John Graham, Ty McClure, Brent H. Meyer, Michael Sparks, Sonya R. Waddell, Daniel Weitz
34984.abstract: We use novel data from a survey of nearly 750 corporate executives to study the effects of artificial intelligence (AI) on productivity and the workforce. We document substantial heterogeneity in AI adoption across firms, with more than half having already invested, though many smaller firms are only beginning to do so. Labor productivity gains are positive, vary across sectors, and are expected to strengthen in 2026, with the largest effects concentrated in high-skill services and finance. These gains are not primarily driven by firms' capital deepening but instead reflect increases in revenue-based total factor productivity, closely associated with innovation-and demand-oriented channels. We document a productivity paradox, in which perceived productivity gains are larger than measured productivity gains, likely reflecting a delay in revenue realizations. In labor markets, we find little evidence of near-term aggregate employment declines due to AI, though larger companies anticipate AI-driven workforce reductions, while smaller firms expect modest gains. We also find evidence of compositional reallocation of labor both within and across firms, with routine clerical roles declining and a relative demand for skilled technical roles increasing. We develop an index that ranks job functions most negatively affected by AI.
34984.zh_abstract: 我们利用一项对近750名企业高管进行的新调查数据，研究人工智能对生产力和劳动力的影响。我们记录了企业在人工智能采用方面的显著异质性，超过一半的企业已经进行了投资，尽管许多小企业才刚刚开始。劳动生产率提升是正向的，在不同行业间存在差异，并预计在2026年将进一步加强，其中最大的影响集中在高技能服务业和金融业。这些提升并非主要由企业的资本深化驱动，而是反映了基于收入的全要素生产率的增长，这与创新导向和需求导向的渠道密切相关。我们记录了一个生产力悖论，即感知到的生产力提升大于测量到的生产力提升，这很可能反映了收入实现的延迟。在劳动力市场，我们几乎没有发现人工智能导致近期总体就业下降的证据，尽管大公司预期会出现人工智能驱动的劳动力减少，而小公司则预期会有适度增长。我们还发现了劳动力在企业内部和企业之间进行构成性重新配置的证据，常规文职岗位减少，而对熟练技术岗位的相对需求增加。我们构建了一个指数，对受人工智能负面影响最大的工作职能进行排序。
34984.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, LS, PR；JEL：D22, D24, G0, J01, J24, M15, O33

34983.title: An 'Austrian' Model of International Specialization
34983.zh_title: 一个“奥地利学派”的国际专业化模型
34983.abstract: We develop a general equilibrium model of international trade in which the temporal structure of production is a key determinant of comparative advantage. Building on Böhm-Bawerk’s theory of capital, the model formalizes the idea that production processes with longer average periods of production (APPs) entail higher financing costs due to the time lag between input payments and revenue realization. We embed this insight into a multi-sector Ricardian framework with endogenous interest rates. Under autarky, countries with more patient consumers or more developed financial markets exhibit lower equilibrium interest rates and higher wage rates. With international trade, these countries typically gain a comparative advantage in sectors with longer APPs, though the model can also generate multiple equilibria and unconventional specialization patterns. We extend the framework to include trade costs (inclusive of shipment delays), global value chains, and international capital-market integration. Empirically, we present evidence showing that countries with more developed financial systems export disproportionately more in sectors with longer APPs, even after controlling for standard neoclassical and institutional determinants of comparative advantage.
34983.zh_abstract: 我们建立了一个国际贸易的一般均衡模型，其中生产的时间结构是比较优势的关键决定因素。基于庞巴维克的资本理论，该模型形式化了这样一个观点：由于投入支付与收入实现之间存在时间差，平均生产周期较长的生产过程会带来更高的融资成本。我们将这一见解嵌入到一个具有内生利率的多部门李嘉图框架中。在自给自足状态下，拥有更耐心消费者或更发达金融市场的国家表现出更低的均衡利率和更高的工资率。在存在国际贸易的情况下，这些国家通常在平均生产周期较长的部门获得比较优势，尽管该模型也可能产生多重均衡和非常规的专业化模式。我们将该框架扩展到包括贸易成本（含运输延误）、全球价值链和国际资本市场一体化。在实证方面，我们提供的证据表明，即使控制了比较优势的标准新古典和制度决定因素，金融体系更发达的国家在平均生产周期较长的部门出口比例也更高。
34983.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI, PR；JEL：F1, F2, F3, F4, F6

34982.title: Household Migration and Collateral Constraint: Cash-based Housing Resettlement in China
34982.zh_title: 家庭迁移与抵押品约束：中国的现金化住房安置
34982.authors: Zhiguo He, Zehao Liu, Xinle Pang, Yang Su, Kunru Zou
34982.abstract: Collateral constraints limit household migration to expensive locations by restricting financing for home purchases. Such endogenous location choice amplifies the impact of relaxing household borrowing constraints. Using China’s cash-based shantytown renovation program (2015-2018) as a natural experiment, we provide evidence that cash resettlement—by converting illiquid shanty houses into cash—facilitated household location upgrading and raised house prices in more expensive locations. A dynamic spatial model with collateral constraints confirms household migration responses to the cash transfer. Quantitatively, endogenous migration amplifies household housing expenditure responses by around 40%, and is able to explain more than 20% of the housing price growth in 2016-2020.
34982.zh_abstract: 抵押品约束通过限制购房融资，限制了家庭向昂贵地区的迁移。这种内生的区位选择放大了放松家庭借贷约束的影响。利用中国的现金化棚户区改造项目（2015-2018年）作为自然实验，我们提供的证据表明，现金安置——通过将非流动性的棚户区房屋转换为现金——促进了家庭区位升级，并推高了更昂贵地区的房价。一个包含抵押品约束的动态空间模型证实了家庭对现金转移的迁移反应。在定量分析中，内生迁移将家庭住房支出反应放大了约40%，并且能够解释2016-2020年房价增长的20%以上。

34981.title: The Long-Term Decline of the U.S. Job Ladder
34981.zh_title: 美国职业阶梯的长期衰退
34981.authors: Niklas Engbom, Aniket Baksy, Daniele Caratelli
34981.abstract: We quantify how structural changes in the U.S. labor market have contributed to wage stagnation over the past four decades by weakening the job ladder. Using Current Population Survey microdata from 1982–2023 and a partial-equilibrium job-ladder model, we estimate that employed workers today are about half as likely to receive a better-paying outside offer as they were in the 1980s. This decline is unlikely to reflect less efficient matching, weaker labor demand, or changes in workers' acceptance behavior. Instead, cross-state variation is consistent with rising employer concentration and the growing use of noncompete agreements having curtailed opportunities for job shopping. In a general equilibrium version of the model, we find that these changes have reduced annual real wage growth by 0.68 percentage points—roughly one-third of the post-1980 slowdown—with about two-thirds of the effect operating through equilibrium wage setting rather than mechanical reallocation.
34981.zh_abstract: 我们量化了美国劳动力市场的结构性变化在过去四十年中如何通过削弱职业阶梯而导致工资停滞。利用1982-2023年的当前人口调查微观数据和一个局部均衡的职业阶梯模型，我们估计，如今在职员工获得更高薪酬外部工作机会的可能性大约是1980年代的一半。这种下降不太可能反映匹配效率降低、劳动力需求减弱或工人接受行为的变化。相反，跨州的变化与雇主集中度上升以及竞业禁止协议使用的增加相一致，这些因素限制了跳槽机会。在该模型的一般均衡版本中，我们发现这些变化使实际工资年增长率降低了0.68个百分点——约占1980年后工资增长放缓的三分之一——其中约三分之二的影响是通过均衡工资设定而非机械性重新配置发挥作用的。

34980.title: Does Employment Shift Mothers' Voting Behavior and Political Identity?
34980.zh_title: 就业是否会改变母亲的投票行为和政治认同？
34980.abstract: While the correlation between working and voting is positive, I provide the first causal evidence that this relationship is negative. Using five decades of Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC) expansions and 1990s welfare reform as instruments for employment, I find that working lowers voter turnout and increases conservatism among lower-income mothers. Voter registration, political knowledge, and civic engagement decline, while preferences for conservative policies rise. Effects are largest for unmarried, younger, and less-educated mothers and are substantially stronger outside metropolitan areas. Notably, political shifts are concentrated among White women despite larger employment gains among non-White women, driven in part by White women entering more conservative coworker environments. Prior exposure to work also matters: women without working mothers experience larger ideological shifts. While recent decades have seen more women voting Democrat, even more women would have voted Democrat if not for decades of pro-work public policy targeting lower-income mothers.
34980.zh_abstract: 尽管工作与投票之间的相关性是正的，但我提供了第一个因果证据表明这种关系是负的。利用五十年的劳动所得税抵免政策扩张和1990年代的福利改革作为就业的工具变量，我发现工作会降低低收入母亲的选民投票率并增加其保守主义倾向。选民登记、政治知识和公民参与度下降，而对保守政策的偏好上升。这些影响在未婚、年轻和受教育程度较低的母亲中最大，并且在非大都市地区显著更强。值得注意的是，政治转变主要集中在白人女性中，尽管非白人女性的就业增长更大，这部分是由于白人女性进入了更保守的同事环境。先前的工作经历也很重要：母亲没有工作经历的女性经历了更大的意识形态转变。尽管近几十年来有更多女性投票给民主党，但如果不是因为几十年来针对低收入母亲的亲就业公共政策，投票给民主党的女性会更多。

34978.title: Climate Fairness and Growth: Allocating the Remaining Carbon Budget
34978.zh_title: 气候公平与增长：分配剩余碳预算
34978.authors: Galina Hale, Michael Halling, Nora Alice. Paulus, Han H.G. Pham
34978.abstract: Limiting global warming to 1.5 degrees requires that cumulative carbon dioxide emissions remain within a finite remaining carbon budget. How this budget is allocated across countries raises questions of fairness and development. This paper evaluates whether equity-based carbon allocations are compatible with sustained economic growth in emerging and developing economies. We compute country-level fair shares of the remaining carbon budget under the equal-cumulative-per-capita (ECPC) principle. Using data for 162 countries between 1950 and 2023, we then estimate the historical relationship between income and per-capita CO2 emissions across income groups and use these elasticities to simulate cumulative emissions until 2050. Our results show that ECPC implies strongly negative remaining carbon budgets for most advanced economies, while lower-income countries retain positive but constrained allocations. Under historically observed income–emissions elasticities, many developing countries would exceed their fair shares when converging toward advanced-economy income levels. At the aggregate level, unused allocations offset only 17% of the combined carbon budget shortfall implied by countries exceeding their allocation and the negative fair shares arising from historical responsibilities. In a scenario in which we assume that the technology of advanced economies is transferred to all countries, the carbon budget coverage increases to 38%.
34978.zh_abstract: 将全球变暖限制在1.5度以内，要求累计二氧化碳排放量保持在有限的剩余碳预算之内。如何在不同国家之间分配这一预算引发了关于公平和发展的问题。本文评估了基于公平的碳分配是否与新兴和发展中经济体的持续经济增长兼容。我们根据人均累计平等原则计算了各国在剩余碳预算中的公平份额。利用1950年至2023年间162个国家的数据，我们随后估计了不同收入群体间收入与人均二氧化碳排放量的历史关系，并使用这些弹性来模拟直至2050年的累计排放量。我们的结果表明，人均累计平等原则意味着大多数发达经济体的剩余碳预算为强负值，而低收入国家则保留了正值但受限的分配。在历史上观察到的收入-排放弹性下，许多发展中国家在向发达经济体收入水平趋同的过程中将超过其公平份额。在总体层面，未使用的分配仅抵消了由各国超出其分配和历史责任导致的负公平份额所共同造成的碳预算缺口的17%。在一个我们假设发达经济体的技术被转移到所有国家的情景中，碳预算覆盖率增加到38%。
34978.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, IFM；JEL：D63, F64, O13, Q54

34977.title: From Free Rider to Innovator: The Rise of China's Drug Development
34977.zh_title: 从搭便车者到创新者：中国药物开发的崛起
34977.authors: Panle Jia Barwick, Hongyuan Xia, Tianli Xia
34977.abstract: This paper examines China’s transition from pharmaceutical “free rider” to global innovator over the last decade. In 2010, China accounted for less than 8% of global clinical trials; by 2020, it had surpassed the US in annual registered clinical trial volume. To study this transformation, we compile a comprehensive, synchronized database spanning the pharmaceutical drug development supply chain, covering scientific publications, clinical trials, drug development milestones for China, the U.S., and Europe, alongside drug sales and government policies over the same period. We provide strong evidence that China’s rise was primarily driven by the National Reimbursement Drug List (NRDL) reform, which dramatically expanded the effective market size for innovative drugs. We document a sharp rise in both the quantity (86% increase) and novelty of drug trials post reform, with growth concentrated in reform-exposed disease categories, first- or best-in-class drugs, and among domestic firms. A decomposition exercise reveals that the NRDL reform accounts for 43% of the growth in oncology trial activity, nearly doubling the combined contribution of upstream knowledge accumulation and talent flows (24%), while other government policies play a minor role. Finally, dynamic gains from induced innovation exceed the reform’s static gains in consumer access to innovative drugs by threefold, underscoring the importance of accounting for the reform’s long-run effects on innovation incentives in addition to near-term improvements in drug affordability.
34977.zh_abstract: 本文考察了过去十年中国从制药“搭便车者”向全球创新者的转型。2010年，中国占全球临床试验的比例不到8%；到2020年，其在年度注册临床试验数量上已超过美国。为了研究这一转变，我们编制了一个全面的、同步的数据库，涵盖药物开发供应链，包括同一时期中国、美国和欧洲的科学出版物、临床试验、药物开发里程碑，以及药品销售和政府政策。我们提供了强有力的证据，表明中国的崛起主要由国家医保目录改革驱动，该改革极大地扩大了创新药物的有效市场规模。我们记录了改革后药物试验数量（增长86%）和新颖性的急剧上升，增长集中在受改革影响的疾病类别、首创或同类最佳药物以及国内企业中。一项分解分析显示，国家医保目录改革占肿瘤学试验活动增长的43%，几乎是上游知识积累和人才流动总贡献（24%）的两倍，而其他政府政策的作用较小。最后，诱导创新的动态收益是改革在消费者获得创新药物方面静态收益的三倍，这强调了在考虑改革对药物可负担性的近期改善之外，还需考虑其对创新激励的长期影响。
34977.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PR；JEL：I18, L65, O31, O38

34976.title: The Rise of the Modern Hospital and Early-Life Health: Evidence from the Hill-Burton Act
34976.zh_title: 现代医院的兴起与早期健康：来自希尔-伯顿法案的证据
34976.authors: Owen Thompson, Jason Fletcher, Karin Wu
34976.abstract: The U.S. hospital sector expanded rapidly in the 1950s and 1960s, largely due to construction subsidies provided under federal legislation known as the Hill-Burton Act. This paper examines the impact of Hill-Burton grants on maternity care access and infant health. We find that grants for public hospitals significantly reduced out-of-hospital births and infant mortality, particularly among non-white populations. In contrast, grants for private non-profit hospitals had no measurable effects on out-of-hospital births or infant mortality.
34976.zh_abstract: 美国医院部门在1950年代和1960年代迅速扩张，这主要归功于联邦立法《希尔-伯顿法案》提供的建设补贴。本文研究了希尔-伯顿拨款对产科护理可及性和婴儿健康的影响。我们发现，对公立医院的拨款显著降低了非医院分娩率和婴儿死亡率，尤其是在非白人口群体中。相比之下，对私立非营利医院的拨款对非医院分娩率或婴儿死亡率没有可测量的影响。
34976.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H40, I39, J18

34975.title: Standardized Test Scores and Academic Performance at a Public University System
34975.zh_title: 标准化考试成绩与公立大学系统的学业表现
34975.authors: Theodore J. Joyce, Mina Afrouzi Khosroshahi, Sarah Truelsch, Kerstin Gentsch, Kyle Du
34975.abstract: Recent studies of Ivy-Plus institutions suggest that standardized test scores (SAT/ACT) are far better predictors of college success than high school grade point average (HS-GPA), prompting a return to the requirement that test scores be submitted for admission at elite colleges. We ask whether re-establishing the SAT requirement for admission at a large urban public university system would improve the predictability of academic outcomes. Using administrative data for the 2010-2019 first-year cohorts, we update earlier work of students from public universities as to the relative predictive power of HSGPA and SAT scores on first-year outcomes and graduation rates. Contrary to findings at elite private institutions, we find that HSGPA is the dominant predictor of academic success in this public system. A one-standard-deviation increase in HSGPA is four to six times more predictive of six-year graduation than a comparable increase in SAT scores. Out-of-sample forecasts for the post-COVID period (2020–2024) confirm that test-optional models relying only on HSGPA experience relatively little loss in predictive accuracy compared to models that include test scores. We conclude that HSGPA remains the most reliable signal of degree completion at broad-access public universities.
34975.zh_abstract: 近期对常春藤联盟及同类精英院校的研究表明，标准化考试成绩（SAT/ACT）预测大学成功的准确性远高于高中平均绩点（HS-GPA），这促使精英大学重新要求提交考试成绩作为录取条件。我们探究了在一所大型城市公立大学系统中重新设立SAT录取要求是否会提高学业成果的可预测性。利用2010-2019年新生队列的行政数据，我们更新了早期关于公立大学学生HSGPA和SAT分数对第一年学业成果及毕业率相对预测能力的研究。与精英私立院校的发现相反，我们发现HSGPA是该公立系统中学业成功的主要预测指标。HSGPA每增加一个标准差，对六年毕业率的预测能力是SAT分数同等增幅的四到六倍。对后疫情时期（2020-2024年）的样本外预测证实，与包含考试成绩的模型相比，仅依赖HSGPA的考试可选模型在预测准确性上的损失相对较小。我们得出结论，在宽准入的公立大学中，HSGPA仍然是学位完成最可靠的信号。

34974.title: Financial Conditions Targeting in a Multi-Asset Open Economy
34974.zh_title: 多资产开放经济中的金融状况目标制
34974.abstract: We analyze monetary policy responses to noisy financial conditions in an open economy where exchange rates and domestic asset prices affect aggregate demand. Noise traders operate in both markets, and specialized arbitrageurs have limited risk-bearing capacity. Monetary policy creates cross-market spillovers: by adjusting the interest rate to stabilize one market, the central bank influences volatility in the other. We show that targeting a financial conditions index (FCI)—a weighted average of exchange rates and domestic asset prices—delivers substantial macroeconomic benefits. FCI targeting commits the central bank to respond to unexpected movements in financial conditions beyond what discretionary monetary policy implies. These stronger responses improve diversification across markets: each market becomes more exposed to external shocks but less exposed to its own. This reduces volatility in both markets and activates the recruitment effect from Caballero et al. (2025b) in each market—lower variance induces arbitrageurs to trade against noise, further dampening volatility. Foreign exchange (FX) targeting can also be effective when the exchange rate is the primary source of noise, with benefits that increase as the economy becomes more open. In this case, FX targeting recruits arbitrageurs to stabilize the FX market, reducing volatility and dampening the macroeconomic impact of noise. However, FX targeting also raises volatility in non-targeted markets through anti-recruitment effects, limiting its effectiveness relative to FCI targeting, especially when domestic asset markets also matter for financial conditions and are comparably noisy.
34974.zh_abstract: 我们分析了在一个汇率和国内资产价格影响总需求的开放经济中，货币政策对嘈杂金融状况的反应。噪音交易者在两个市场中运作，而专业套利者的风险承担能力有限。货币政策会产生跨市场溢出效应：通过调整利率来稳定一个市场，中央银行会影响另一个市场的波动性。我们表明，以金融状况指数（FCI）——汇率和国内资产价格的加权平均值——为目标能带来显著的宏观经济收益。FCI目标制迫使中央银行对金融状况的意外变动做出超出相机抉择货币政策所隐含的反应。这些更强的反应改善了跨市场的多样化：每个市场对外部冲击变得更加敏感，但对其自身冲击的敏感性降低。这减少了两市场的波动性，并在每个市场中激活了Caballero等人（2025b）的招募效应——较低的方差促使套利者与噪音进行反向交易，从而进一步抑制波动。当汇率是噪音的主要来源时，外汇（FX）目标制也可能有效，其收益随着经济更加开放而增加。在这种情况下，外汇目标制招募套利者来稳定外汇市场，降低波动性并抑制噪音对宏观经济的影响。然而，外汇目标制也通过反招募效应提高了非目标市场的波动性，这限制了其相对于FCI目标制的有效性，尤其是当国内资产市场对金融状况也很重要且噪音水平相当时。
34974.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E32, E40, E44, E52, F30, F41, G12, G15

34973.title: Identifying Uncertainty, Learning about Productivity, and Human Capital Acquisition: A Reassessment of Labor Market Sorting and Firm Monopsony Power
34973.zh_title: 识别不确定性、学习生产率和人力资本获取：对劳动力市场分类和企业买方垄断势力的重新评估
34973.authors: Cristina Gualdani, Elena Pastorino, Áureo de Paula, Sergio Salgado
34973.abstract: We examine the empirical content of a large class of dynamic matching models of the labor market with ex-ante heterogeneous firms and workers, symmetric uncertainty and learning about workers’ productivity, and firms’ monopsony power. We allow workers’ human capital, acquired before and after entry into the labor market, to be general across firms to varying degrees. Such a framework nests and extends known models of worker turnover across firms, occupational choice, wage growth, wage differentials across occupations, firms, and industries, and wage dispersion across workers and over the life cycle. We establish intuitive conditions under which the model primitives are semiparametrically identified solely from data on workers’ wages and jobs, despite the dynamics of these models giving rise to complex patterns of selection based on endogenously time-varying observable and unobservable characteristics of workers and firms. By relying on this identification argument, we develop a constructive estimator of the model primitives, which builds on common methods for mixture and extremal quantile regression models and displays standard properties. Through the lens of this framework, we investigate how well typical empirical wage measures of matching assortativeness and firms’ wage-setting power detect the degrees of sorting and monopsony power in the labor market, respectively. We show that usual measures of sorting severely understate its importance because they ignore the option value of worker human capital and the information about worker productivity acquired through employment, in terms of higher future wages and improved future sorting, which is priced into current wages thus depressing them. We also demonstrate how the markdown of wages relative to output largely overstates firms’ labor market power by ignoring that this option value, which captures future returns from acquired human capital and information, generally lowers wages. We find evidence of both of these features in U.S. data by documenting a strong degree of labor market sorting once appropriately measured and, correspondingly, a lower degree of firm monopsony power than typically documented.
34973.zh_abstract: 我们考察了一大类动态劳动力市场匹配模型的经验内容，这些模型包含事前异质性的企业和工人、关于工人生产率的对称不确定性和学习，以及企业的买方垄断势力。我们允许工人在进入劳动力市场之前和之后获得的人力资本在不同企业间具有不同程度的通用性。这样的框架嵌套并扩展了已知的关于工人跨企业流动、职业选择、工资增长、跨职业/企业/行业的工资差异以及工人间和生命周期内工资离散度的模型。我们建立了直观的条件，在这些条件下，尽管这些模型的动态性导致了基于工人和企业内生时变可观测与不可观测特征的复杂选择模式，但模型的基本参数仅凭工人工资和工作数据即可进行半参数识别。基于这一识别论证，我们开发了一个模型基本参数的构造性估计量，该估计量建立在混合模型和极值分位数回归模型的常用方法之上，并展现出标准性质。通过这个框架的视角，我们研究了典型的匹配分类度和企业工资设定权的经验工资度量分别能在多大程度上检测劳动力市场中的分类程度和买方垄断势力。我们表明，通常的分类度量严重低估了其重要性，因为它们忽略了工人人力资本的选择价值以及通过就业获得的关于工人生产率的信息——这些信息体现在更高的未来工资和改善的未来分类上，并被定价到当前工资中，从而压低了当前工资。我们还证明了，工资相对于产出的折扣在很大程度上夸大了企业的劳动力市场势力，因为它忽略了这种选择价值（它捕捉了从已获得的人力资本和信息中获得的未来回报）通常会降低工资。我们在美国数据中发现了这两个特征的证据，记录了在适当衡量后存在强烈的劳动力市场分类程度，以及相应地，企业买方垄断势力程度低于通常记录的水平。
34973.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE；JEL：E20, H0, J31, J42

34972.title: Reserve Demand Estimation with Minimal Theory
34972.zh_title: 基于最小化理论的准备金需求估计
34972.abstract: We propose a new reserve-demand estimation strategy—a middle ground between atheoretical reduced-form econometric approaches and fully structural quantitative-theoretic approaches. The strategy consists of an econometric specification that satisfies core restrictions implied by theory and controls for changes in administered-rate spreads that induce rotations and shifts in reserve demand. The resulting approach is as user-friendly as existing reduced-form econometric methods but improves upon them by incorporating a minimal set of theoretical restrictions that any reserve demand must satisfy. We apply this approach to U.S. data and obtain reserve-demand estimates that are broadly consistent with the structural estimates in Lagos and Navarro (2023).
34972.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新的准备金需求估计策略——介于非理论的简化形式计量经济学方法与完全结构化的定量理论方法之间的中间地带。该策略由一个计量经济学规范组成，该规范满足理论所隐含的核心约束，并控制管理利率利差的变化，这些变化会引起准备金需求的旋转和移动。由此产生的方法与现有的简化形式计量经济学方法一样易于使用，但通过纳入任何准备金需求都必须满足的最小理论约束集而对其进行了改进。我们将此方法应用于美国数据，获得了与Lagos和Navarro（2023）的结构性估计大致一致的回准备金需求估计值。

34999.title: The Impact of Virtual Instruction on the Transition to College: Evidence from COVID-19
34999.zh_title: 虚拟教学对大学入学过渡的影响：来自COVID-19的证据
34999.authors: Nolan G. Pope, Yu Hung Yaow
34999.abstract: During the COVID-19 pandemic, virtual instruction reduced in-person support that may have helped high school students transition to college. Using national school-level data on FAFSA submissions, ACT participation, and first-year college enrollment, we estimate a difference-in-differences model that exploits cross-school variation in virtual instruction during the 2020/2021 school year. A fully virtual school year reduced FAFSA submissions by 4.2 percentage points, ACT participation by 4.8 percentage points, and first-year college enrollment by 2.5 percentage points. FAFSA submissions partially rebounded after reopening, but ACT participation and college enrollment did not. Effects were substantially larger in disadvantaged schools.
34999.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19疫情期间，虚拟教学减少了可能帮助高中生过渡到大学的线下支持。利用关于FAFSA提交、ACT参与和大学一年级入学的全国性学校层面数据，我们估计了一个双重差分模型，该模型利用了2020/2021学年各学校在虚拟教学方面的差异。一个完全虚拟的学年使FAFSA提交率降低了4.2个百分点，ACT参与率降低了4.8个百分点，大学一年级入学率降低了2.5个百分点。FAFSA提交率在重新开放后部分回升，但ACT参与率和大学入学率并未恢复。在弱势学校中，这些影响要大得多。

34998.title: Special Education Substantially Improves Learning: Evidence from Three States
34998.zh_title: 特殊教育显著改善学习：来自三个州的证据
34998.authors: Stephanie G. Coffey, Joshua Goodman, Amy Ellen Schwartz, Leanna Stiefel, Marcus A. Winters, Yunee H. Yoon
34998.abstract: Special education serves more than one in seven U.S. students yet its causal impact remains understudied. Using longitudinal data from Massachusetts, Indiana, and Connecticut, we estimate the effect of individualized supports with an event-study design that tracks achievement around initial classification. Students’ scores decline prior to placement and rise sharply afterward, yielding a consistent V-shaped pattern. Within three years, achievement is 0.2–0.4σ higher than counterfactual trends imply. Gains are similar across disability categories and subgroups, are not driven by testing accommodations, and remain under conservative assumptions. Individualized supports substantially increase learning productivity.
34998.zh_abstract: 特殊教育服务于超过七分之一的美国学生，但其因果影响仍未得到充分研究。利用来自马萨诸塞州、印第安纳州和康涅狄格州的纵向数据，我们采用事件研究设计，追踪学生初始分类前后的学业成绩，来估计个性化支持的效果。学生的分数在安置前下降，之后急剧上升，形成一致的V形模式。三年内，学业成绩比反事实趋势所暗示的高出0.2-0.4个标准差。不同残疾类别和子群体之间的收益相似，并非由考试便利措施驱动，并且在保守假设下依然稳健。个性化支持显著提高了学习生产力。

34997.title: Paid Caregiving Leave Policies and an Update on Paid Parental Leave
34997.zh_title: 带薪照护假政策与带薪育儿假政策更新
34997.authors: Priyanka Anand, Tamar Matiashvili, Maya Rossin-Slater
34997.abstract: Paid leave policies are designed to help workers balance work with caregiving responsibilities, yet research has focused predominantly on parental leave while the literature on non-parental caregiving leave remains nascent. This chapter reviews the evidence on the impacts of paid family leave (PFL) and paid sick leave (PSL) policies, with a focus on non-childbirth-related caregiving. We begin with an overview of the prevalence and challenges of informal caregiving in the US and internationally, followed by a description of the current paid caregiving leave policy landscape. We then review evidence on the impact of these policies on leave take-up, labor market outcomes, caregiver health and well-being, employer outcomes, and utilization of formal care. We find that paid leave policies have successfully increased leave take-up and that PFL improves labor market outcomes for workers with caregiving responsibilities, without adversely affecting employers. There is also some suggestive evidence of improvements in caregivers’ mental health. We additionally provide an update of the paid parental leave literature since it was last reviewed by Rossin-Slater (2018), describing the latest evidence on maternal health, child health and development, parental labor market outcomes, and employer outcomes. We conclude by identifying key gaps in the literature, including the lack of research on the outcomes of (non-child) care recipients, limited evidence on employer responses, and the underexplored role of PSL in supporting caregiving needs.
34997.zh_abstract: 带薪休假政策旨在帮助工人平衡工作与照护责任，然而研究主要集中在育儿假上，关于非育儿照护假的文献仍处于起步阶段。本章回顾了带薪家事假（PFL）和带薪病假（PSL）政策影响的证据，重点关注与分娩无关的照护。我们首先概述了美国及国际上非正式照护的普遍性和挑战，随后描述了当前带薪照护假政策的格局。接着，我们回顾了这些政策对休假使用、劳动力市场结果、照护者健康与福祉、雇主结果以及正式照护利用的影响证据。我们发现，带薪休假政策成功提高了休假使用率，并且PFL改善了有照护责任的工人的劳动力市场结果，同时未对雇主产生不利影响。还有一些提示性证据表明照护者的心理健康有所改善。此外，我们自Rossin-Slater（2018）上次综述以来，对带薪育儿假文献进行了更新，描述了关于孕产妇健康、儿童健康与发展、父母劳动力市场结果和雇主结果的最新证据。最后，我们指出了文献中的关键空白，包括缺乏对（非子女）照护接受者结果的研究、关于雇主反应的证据有限，以及PSL在支持照护需求方面未被充分探索的作用。
34997.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I18, J13, J14, J38

34996.title: Supporting Student Engagement During Remote Learning: Three Randomized Controlled Trials in Chicago Public Schools
34996.zh_title: 远程学习期间支持学生参与：芝加哥公立学校的三项随机对照试验
34996.authors: Monica P. Bhatt, Jonathan Guryan, Fatemeh Momeni, Philip Oreopoulos, Eleni Packis
34996.abstract: This paper presents the results of three field experiments testing interventions designed to increase engagement and improve learning during remote schooling. Since the COVID-19 pandemic, the use of remote learning when schooling is interrupted has become more common, prompting educators to ask: How can we better engage students during remote instruction? This is especially salient because much of what we know about student engagement is based on in-person schooling, not virtual instruction. In the first experiment, we find that personalized phone calls increased families’ likelihood of registering for a virtual summer schooling program in Chicago Public Schools, the pre-specified primary outcome. In the second experiment, we find sending weekly text messages had no effect on students’ summer days absent and usage of Khan Academy, the primary outcomes; in analyses of secondary outcomes, we find that the weekly text messages increased students’ likelihood of passing their summer math course. In the third experiment, we find adding an instructional aide to supplement classroom teachers had no effect on the primary outcomes of summer days absent and usage of Khan Academy; in analyses of secondary outcomes, we find beneficial impacts in the following school year on students’ math grades and passing rates.
34996.zh_abstract: 本文介绍了三项现场实验的结果，这些实验测试了旨在提高远程教育期间学生参与度和改善学习的干预措施。自COVID-19大流行以来，当学校教育中断时使用远程学习变得更加普遍，这促使教育工作者提出疑问：我们如何在远程教学中更好地吸引学生？这一点尤为重要，因为我们对学生参与的大部分了解都基于线下教学，而非虚拟教学。在第一项实验中，我们发现个性化电话提高了家庭注册芝加哥公立学校虚拟暑期学校项目的可能性，这是预先指定的主要结果。在第二项实验中，我们发现发送每周短信对学生的暑期缺课天数和可汗学院使用情况（主要结果）没有影响；在对次要结果的分析中，我们发现每周短信提高了学生通过暑期数学课程的可能性。在第三项实验中，我们发现增加一名教学助理来补充课堂教师对暑期缺课天数和可汗学院使用情况（主要结果）没有影响；在对次要结果的分析中，我们发现对下一学年学生的数学成绩和通过率产生了有益影响。
34996.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS；JEL：I21, I24, J01, J24

34995.title: Mind the Gap: AI Adoption in Europe and the U.S.
34995.zh_title: 关注差距：欧洲与美国的AI采纳
34995.authors: Alexander Bick, Adam Blandin, David J. Deming, Nicola Fuchs-Schündeln, Jonas Jessen
34995.abstract: This paper combines international evidence from worker and firm surveys conducted in 2025 and 2026 to document large gaps in AI adoption, both between the US and Europe and across European countries. Cross-country differences in worker demographics and firm composition account for an important share of these gaps. AI adoption, within and across countries, is also closely linked to firm personnel management practices and whether firms actively encourage AI use by workers. Micro-level evidence suggests that AI generates meaningful time savings for many workers. At the macro level, in recent years industries with higher AI adoption rates have experienced faster productivity growth. While we do not establish causality, this relationship is statistically significant and similar in magnitude in Europe and the US. We do not find clear evidence that industry-level AI adoption is associated with employment changes. We discuss limitations of existing data and outline priorities for future data collection to better assess the productivity and labor market effects of AI.
34995.zh_abstract: 本文结合2025年和2026年进行的工人和企业调查的国际证据，记录了AI采纳方面的巨大差距，既存在于美国与欧洲之间，也存在于欧洲各国之间。工人人口统计特征和企业构成的跨国差异解释了这些差距的很大一部分。在各国国内和跨国之间，AI采纳也与企业人事管理实践以及企业是否积极鼓励工人使用AI密切相关。微观层面的证据表明，AI为许多工人带来了有意义的节省时间的效果。在宏观层面，近年来AI采纳率较高的行业经历了更快的生产率增长。虽然我们未建立因果关系，但这种关系在统计上显著，且在欧洲和美国的规模相似。我们没有发现明确的证据表明行业层面的AI采纳与就业变化相关。我们讨论了现有数据的局限性，并概述了未来数据收集的优先事项，以便更好地评估AI的生产率和劳动力市场效应。

34994.title: Steering Technological Progress
34994.abstract: Rapid progress in new technologies such as AI has led to widespread anxiety about adverse labor market impacts. This paper asks how to guide innovative efforts so as to increase labor demand and create better-paying jobs while also evaluating the limitations of such an approach. We develop a theoretical framework to identify the properties that make an innovation desirable from the perspective of workers, including its technological complementarity to labor, the relative income of the affected workers, and the factor share of labor in producing the goods involved. Applications include robot taxation, factor-augmenting progress, and task automation. In our framework, the welfare benefits of steering technology are greater the less efficient social safety nets are. As technological progress devalues labor, the welfare benefits of steering are at first increased but, but beyond a critical threshold, decline and optimal policy shifts toward greater redistribution. Moreover, as labor's economic value diminishes, steering progress focuses increasingly on enhancing human well-being rather than labor productivity.
34994.zh_abstract: 人工智能等新技术的快速进步引发了人们对劳动力市场负面影响的广泛焦虑。本文探讨如何引导创新努力，以增加劳动力需求并创造薪酬更高的就业岗位，同时评估这种方法的局限性。我们构建了一个理论框架，以确定从工人角度看一项创新应具备的理想属性，包括其与劳动的技术互补性、受影响工人的相对收入，以及劳动在生产相关商品中的要素份额。应用包括机器人税、要素偏向性进步和任务自动化。在我们的框架中，社会保障网络效率越低，引导技术的福利收益就越大。随着技术进步使劳动贬值，引导的福利收益起初会增加，但超过某个临界阈值后会下降，最优政策转向更大的再分配。此外，随着劳动的经济价值下降，引导进步的重点日益转向提升人类福祉而非劳动生产率。
34994.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE, PR；JEL：D63, E64, O3

34993.title: Bank Fees and Household Financial Well-Being
34993.zh_title: 银行费用与家庭财务福祉
34993.authors: Michaela Pagel, Sharada Sridhar, Emily Williams
34993.abstract: In this study, we examine policy changes from large U.S. banks between 2017 and 2022, which eliminated non-sufficient funds (NSF) fees and relaxed overdraft policies. Using individual transaction-level data, we find that the elimination of NSF fees, not surprisingly, resulted in immediate reductions in NSF charges across the income distribution. However, relaxing overdraft policies resulted in reductions in overdraft fees only for wealthier households, along the dimensions of income and liquidity, and only those enjoyed subsequent declines in late fees, interest payments, account maintenance fees, and the use of alternative financial services, such as payday loans. Our results thus suggest that the policy changes were not substantial enough to significantly reduce the financial stress of the more vulnerable households. As our setting features multiple treatments and variation in treatment intensities, we theoretically motivate and empirically implement a new stacked event study estimator closely related to de Chaisemartin et al (2024) to address the biases arising from staggered DID specifications.
34993.zh_abstract: 在本研究中，我们考察了2017年至2022年间美国大型银行的政策变化，这些变化取消了资金不足（NSF）费用并放宽了透支政策。利用个人交易层面的数据，我们发现，不出所料，取消NSF费用导致各收入阶层的NSF收费立即减少。然而，放宽透支政策仅在收入和流动性维度上减少了较富裕家庭的透支费用，并且只有这些家庭随后在滞纳金、利息支付、账户维护费以及替代性金融服务（如发薪日贷款）的使用方面有所减少。因此，我们的结果表明，这些政策变化不足以显著减轻更脆弱家庭的财务压力。由于我们的研究设定包含多种处理方式以及处理强度的变化，我们从理论上进行论证，并实证实施了一种新的堆叠事件研究估计量，该估计量与de Chaisemartin等人（2024）的方法密切相关，以解决交错双重差分设定中产生的偏差。

34992.title: Preferences for Warning Signal Quality: Experimental Evidence
34992.zh_title: 对预警信号质量的偏好：实验证据
34992.authors: Alexander Ugarov, Arya Gaduh, Peter McGee
34992.abstract: We use a laboratory experiment to study preferences over false-positive and false-negative rates of warning signals for an adverse event with a known prior. We find that subjects decrease their demand with signal quality, but less than predicted by our theory. There is asymmetric under-responsiveness by prior: for a low (high) prior, their willingness-to-pay does not fully adjust for the increase in the false-positive (false-negative) costs. We show that neither risk preference nor Bayesian updating skills can fully explain our results. Our results are most consistent with a decision-making heuristic in which subjects do not distinguish between false-positive and false-negative errors.
34992.zh_abstract: 我们通过一个实验室实验来研究在已知先验概率下，对不良事件的预警信号的假阳性率和假阴性率的偏好。我们发现，受试者随着信号质量的提高而降低其需求，但降低幅度小于我们理论的预测。存在由先验概率导致的非对称反应不足：对于低（高）先验概率，他们的支付意愿未能完全针对假阳性（假阴性）成本的增加进行调整。我们表明，风险偏好和贝叶斯更新技能都无法完全解释我们的结果。我们的结果与一种决策启发式最为一致，在这种启发式中，受试者不区分假阳性错误和假阴性错误。
